reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.content_original: 宴庭跟后两家比起来一般，但刚回国自带啥都好吃滤镜… 备品挺大碗的，但是没后两家的用着舒服，甚至不如美国大车店= =… 服务跟后两家比起来也差一大截，不过不喜欢麻烦别人的性格表示无所谓… 泳池虽然在地下一层，但有个玻璃顶，感觉光线、水质都比后两家几十层的泳池好… 健身房器械较少但有单独的瑜伽房… 办签证是真的方便…
reviews.content_en: Dining venue is average compared to the other two hotels, though I had a positive bias from just returning to China. Amenities are quite substantial but not as comfortable as the other two properties, even inferior to American casino hotels. Service is noticeably weaker than the other two, though given my preference not to trouble staff, this doesn't bother me much. The pool, while located underground, has a glass ceiling providing better lighting and water quality than the pools several dozen floors up at the other two hotels. The gym has fewer machines but offers a separate yoga room. The visa application service is genuinely convenient.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.actual_room_type: King Bed with Bund View Deluxe
reviews.snp_stacking: Points didn't post for a long time, manually reposted via phone call
reviews.content_original: 悦轩好吃，是这几家里最好吃的（最好评的是最便宜的两个菜：佛手西芹和石板肉），不点硬核的菜100刀感觉够三个人吃了… 有象征性欢迎水果、点心，FHR欢迎信… 备品是上海这三家里最喜欢的、迷迭香白茶味很好闻，身体乳直接上脸都没问题(丽思的上脸轻微刺痛、瑞吉的可以直接毁容)… 拖鞋也是最舒服的(超大超软的海绵底)… 服务总体比瑞吉强一些… 健身房器械挺多的，但有点挤
reviews.content_en: Yuexuan restaurant is the best among these three hotels. The highest-rated dishes are the most affordable options: Buddha's hand with celery and slate-grilled meat. Ordering non-premium items for $100 feels sufficient for three people. Symbolic welcome fruit and pastries were provided, along with FHR welcome letter. The amenities are my favorite among Shanghai's three properties—the rosemary white tea scent is wonderful, and the body lotion is gentle enough to apply directly to the face (the Ritz-Carlton lotion caused slight stinging, while the Shanghai Jing'an version could literally damage your skin). The slippers are the most comfortable with oversized, soft foam soles. Service overall is noticeably better than the Jing'an property. The gym has plenty of equipment but is somewhat crowded.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.content_original: 服务最好的一家… 甩瑞吉几条街… 手写卡片，欢迎水果过于夸张… Flair景色不错，不点酒的话，有个巴厘岛小吃拼盘性价比爆棚… 金轩味道一般，可能点的菜踩雷了（金丝燕麦虾还行吧，蟹盒踩雷、还有个什么银杏鲜腐竹blabla也是雷）… 健身房器械挺多的、三大件景观，除了泳池还有个温水按摩池
reviews.content_en: The best service among all three properties, far surpassing the Jing'an location. Handwritten cards and excessively generous welcome fruit. Flair has a nice view; without ordering alcohol, there's a Balinese appetizer platter with exceptional value. Jinyuan restaurant's flavors are average—possibly ordered the wrong dishes. The golden-threaded oatmeal shrimp was decent, but the crab course and silver ginkgo with fresh tofu were misses. The gym has plenty of equipment and excellent views of the three major landmarks. In addition to the main pool, there's a warm water massage pool.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.snp_stacking: Had Hyatt non-resort fee points and Globalist point bonus, but no room night credits
reviews.content_original: 唯一一家查了Amex Plat卡片的，当时自助没开，餐厅一般，给了4点退房
reviews.content_en: Only hotel where Amex Platinum card was verified. Self-checkout wasn't available at the time. Restaurant was mediocre. Granted 4pm checkout.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.snp_stacking: Had SNP, resort fee waived. Breakfast credit applicable to dinner; Diamond card $100 credit stackable with meal. Combined with Amex payment to capture Amex offer.
reviews.content_original: LHRC的价格是含resort fee的，预定会扣掉不含resort fee的价格，到店出示钻卡resort fee可免… 早餐credit可以用在晚餐、钻卡的100刀也可以一餐一起抵、还能amex结账撸amex offer… 四舍五入等于不要钱… 吃的网红(or 电视红？)餐厅，没有想象中好吃
reviews.content_en: LHRC rate includes resort fee; booking deducts the non-resort fee price, and presenting Diamond card at check-in waives the resort fee. Breakfast credit can be applied to dinner, and the Diamond card's $100 credit can be combined for one meal; also settled via Amex to earn Amex offers—effectively free. Dined at an influencer restaurant. Not as good as expected.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.snp_stacking: Full Hyatt SNP available. Resort fee earned points (unlike later Bellagio stay which did not have both).
reviews.content_original: 周末早餐可以吃brunch… 吃了三餐自助吃到吐… 吃完一年都不想吃雪蟹腿了… （现在我又可以了）
reviews.content_en: Weekend breakfast included brunch. Had three buffet meals until stuffed. Didn't want to eat king crab legs for a year afterward... (now I can again).

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.content_original: 晚餐吃得挺饱的，Continental Breakfast竟是星巴克
reviews.content_en: Dinner was quite satisfying. The Continental Breakfast was surprisingly just Starbucks.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.content_original: 早餐在美国算好的了！玫瑰碗前入住感觉酒店被OSU包场了，要了late checkout没给…
reviews.content_en: Breakfast was pretty good by American standards! Before the Rose Bowl, the hotel felt booked by OSU. Requested late checkout but didn't receive it.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.content_original: POV景色很不错，吃的份量很足，100刀两个人可以吃撑 有手写卡片、甜点、还给了4点延退，总之这家很厚道… 想maximize dinning credit、不怕麻烦的话可以跟隔壁的Willard Intercontinental来回切
reviews.content_en: Excellent POV views. Generous portions—$100 for two was more than enough. Received personalized handwritten cards, dessert, and 4-hour late checkout. Overall very generous. If maximizing dining credit and willing to switch, you can alternate with the adjacent Willard Intercontinental.

reviews.author: bumblebee
reviews.snp_stacking: Hyatt status did not apply to MGM properties; no SNP or benefits received
reviews.content_original: Delano全SUITE，升级也最厚道，房间也最大，冲浪泳池好评
reviews.content_en: Delano: all suites, most generous upgrades, largest rooms, excellent surfing pool

reviews.author: bumblebee
reviews.snp_stacking: Hyatt status did not apply to MGM properties; no SNP or benefits received
reviews.content_original: NoMad在Park MGM里面，因为禁烟，可能比较适合带娃出行？但房间很小
reviews.content_en: NoMad is inside Park MGM. Being nonsmoking may suit family travel with children, but rooms are very small.

reviews.author: bumblebee
reviews.snp_stacking: Hyatt status did not apply to MGM properties; no SNP or benefits received
reviews.content_original: Bellagio真的有点老了，感觉很一般。但唯MGM旗下，8月唯一家过得去的自助开在这里，吃饭还是方便的
reviews.content_en: Bellagio is quite dated and feels rather average. However, it is the only MGM property with acceptable self-serve breakfast in August, and dining options are convenient.

reviews.author: brokenarcher
reviews.actual_room_type: Strip view panoramic room, high floor with Palazzo view
reviews.snp_stacking: No stacking - FHR benefits only: $100 spa credit (converted to food & beverage at check-in), $25 welcome drink (must use on check-in day), $60 breakfast credit ($30 per person), $5 property credit
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Wynn Las Vegas
入住时段：June 2021
预定渠道：FHR
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房升级strip view panoramic room high floor，直面Palazzo
酒店会员：木有
SNP/会员福利：只收到FHR的福利，$100 spa credit（转food&beverage），$25 welcome drink，$30/人早餐$60，$5 property credit。加resort fee一共付$150收到$200的credit。所有credit不包含tip。spa credit转F&B是YMMV。check out时记得看folio。
reviews.content_en:
Hotel: Wynn Las Vegas
Stay: June 2021
Booking: FHR
Booked/Actual room: Budget room upgraded to strip view panoramic room, high floor with direct Palazzo view
Hotel membership: None
Benefits received: FHR benefits only - $100 spa credit (converted to food & beverage at check-in), $25 welcome drink (must use on check-in day), $60 breakfast credit ($30 per person), $5 property credit. Paid about $150 total with resort fees but received nearly $200 in credits. All credits exclude tips. Spa-to-F&B conversion is YYMV. Always review your folio at checkout.

reviews.author: MarriottBonvoy
reviews.actual_room_type: Lowest category room upgraded 2 levels (specific type not specified)
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Mr. C Seaport (纽约)
入住时段：2021年8月
预定渠道：FHR Prepaid
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房升两级，但是这个酒店房型基本只有朝向之分，而且都很烂
会员福利：100刀餐饮额度，酒店餐厅是狗屎，超市随便买点什么都比它好吃；早餐倒不错
备注：地雷，别订！房间小到卫生间是推拉门，所有房间基本都是停车场/对面屋顶景观，各个意义上都只是个四星酒店。感觉是走关系/交钱进的FHR, 希望明年被除名。完全是因为减去200刀credit之后比Hampton Inn便宜才住的，看来也的确是一分钱一分货。
reviews.content_en: Hotel: Mr. C Seaport (New York). Stay: August 2021. Booked via FHR Prepaid. Received a 2-level upgrade from the lowest room type, but this hotel's room types basically only differ by view direction and are all poor. Member benefits included $100 dining credit, though the hotel restaurant is terrible—you'd get better food anywhere else. Breakfast was decent. Warning: avoid this property. Rooms are tiny with sliding bathroom doors. All rooms overlook either the parking lot or opposite rooftops, basically feels like a 4-star hotel in every sense. This seems like a property that got into FHR through connections or payments rather than merit—I hope it gets delisted next year. Only stayed here because after the $200 credit deduction it was cheaper than a Hampton Inn, and as the saying goes, you get what you pay for.

reviews.author: kaiyoyo
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 credit for restaurant, bar, spa, or room service
reviews.content_original:
随便贡献个上海DP吧，前几个月回国的时候唯一FHR住的酒店，其他都是hyatt/marriott官网订的

酒店名称：上海静安璞丽
入住时段：21年5月 三天
预定渠道：FHR prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：Deluxe King 丐房 升了一小级和丐房没啥区别，因为丐房也很大，啥都有
酒店会员：NA
SNP/会员福利：有$100 credit, 可用于restaurant, bar, spa, room service

整体体验非常好，在静安公园里，环境好；早餐是单点质量也是中上层，比均价¥1500每晚的酒店要好；健身房没人安静，冰毛巾好评；酒店还有个米其林一星。最后入住的年轻人也多，马路对面就是TAXX2, 非常适合蹦完走路回酒店
reviews.content_en:
Sharing a Shanghai review. When I returned to China a few months ago, this was the only FHR hotel I stayed at; others were booked directly on Hyatt/Marriott websites.

Hotel: Pullman Shanghai Jing'an
Stay: May 2021, 3 days
Booking: FHR Prepay
Room Type: Deluxe King (base category); upgraded by one level but basically indistinguishable since the base room was already spacious with everything.
Membership: None
Benefits: $100 credit for restaurant, bar, spa, or room service

Excellent overall experience. Located in Jing'an Park with beautiful surroundings. À la carte breakfast with above-average quality, better than hotels averaging ¥1500/night. Quiet gym; cold towels were great. Has a Michelin-starred restaurant. Lots of young guests; TAXX2 nightclub is across the street—perfect for heading back to the hotel after clubbing.

reviews.author: c94400129
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes - SNP provided. Hilton Gold benefits recognized. Received FHR $100 credit, Gold $50 credit, 4pm checkout. Restaurant closed but property credit used for in-room dining.
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Conrad NY Midtown

入住时段：July 2021, on a random Monday

预定渠道：FHR Prepay

预定房型/实际入住房型：定的乞丐房，升了一级给了City View。应该是因为FHR给升的，而不是因为Hilton Gold。差价$25左右。

酒店会员：Plat送的Hilton Gold

SNP/会员福利：SNP都给了，白金送的Hilton Gold也认了。FHR的$100和Gold的$50都拿了。四点退房。餐厅没开但是Property Credit可以用于In Room Dining。

备注：总体还是很不错的，全suite，位置方便，大厅香水很香，健身房棒，250ml的水无限拿（不像某洲际，连Ambassador都只配拿两瓶免费的水…）。Check in时前台一开始没有发现是FHR遇到以为只是普通Gold，结果发现以后连忙道歉，感觉得到态度的转变…进房间以后发现垃圾桶里有一个口罩（有点恶心 但当天想想懒的去打电话argue了），桌上摆了什么清洁包里面有口罩洗手液手套啥的。备品是上海滩的，香！In room dining还可以就是份量有点小，已经扣了18% service charge。其他没什么惊艳的。Check out的时候其实in room dining是已经吃到$180了（Gold + FHR其实只给$150）但是鉴于是FHR的贵宾，还是全部报销了。最后Balance 0刀。可恶早知道多点一些了哈哈哈哈
reviews.content_en: Overall excellent stay. All-suite property with convenient location. Beautiful lobby fragrance, great fitness center, unlimited 250ml water bottles available (unlike certain other hotel chains where even Ambassadors only get two free bottles). Front desk initially didn't notice the FHR status and thought it was just regular Gold, but quickly apologized once discovered and attitude noticeably improved. Found a face mask in the trash can upon entry (a bit gross but was too lazy to call and complain). Cleaning supplies package on desk with masks, hand sanitizer, gloves. Amenities branded with Shanghai Tan fragrance, very nice. In-room dining quality good but portions small with 18% service charge already deducted. Otherwise nothing particularly remarkable. During checkout, in-room dining charges totaled $180 (Gold + FHR officially only covers $150) but given FHR VIP status, everything was fully covered. Final balance: $0. Wish I'd ordered more knowing it would all be reimbursed!

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes, Hyatt SNP benefits were received
reviews.content_original: 20年1月LHRC订的Aria， hyatt SNP都给了
reviews.content_en: January 2020 Aria booked via LHRC, received all Hyatt SNP benefits

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.content_original: 20年12月FHR prepay的Bellagio，给了积分没给房晚
reviews.content_en: December 2020 Bellagio booked via FHR prepay, received points but not room night credits

reviews.author: SIMNIENIE
reviews.hotel_name_original: The Royal Hawaiian, a Luxury Collection Resort, Waikiki （Historic Wing）
reviews.hotel_name_en: The Royal Hawaiian, a Luxury Collection Resort
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes - SNP available with 5x points, 100 credit, 200 reimbursement, welcome gift, double breakfast, 4pm late checkout
reviews.content_original:
入住时段：2021年5月末
预定渠道：FHR Prepay
预定房型：订的Garden View, 因为觉得乞丐房是no view的万一不能升级太难受了
实际入住房型：升了一级给了Ocean View
酒店会员：Plat送的Gold
SNP/会员福利：有SNP，有x5积分，有100credit，有-200报销，有欢迎礼，有双早和延迟4点checkout

备注：checkin的时候被要求出示白金卡而且需要刷一下，说如果没有卡的话就没有FHR福利。当时预订用的那张白金没带，因为正好开了新的白金，想去刷开卡消费，结果checkin的大叔说也可以用新的那张代替，持卡人姓名是相同的，算是一个有点奇怪的dp。

去之前看网上很多人说这家店比较老旧，其实个人感觉还挺好的，只是内部装修风格比较复古，然后卫生间洗脸池的台面比较小，其他家具都是好用的。

酒店服务很好，欢迎礼贴心而且实用，沐浴露可以直接洗掉防晒霜（后来住的另外一家的沐浴露洗不掉），跟隔壁喜来登共用的泳池和沙滩质量都很高。

疫情后感觉waikiki所有好点的餐厅都需要预约，这家的晚餐也需要，我没约到所以只在吃早饭的地方吃了顿午饭，早饭午饭都挺好吃的。
reviews.content_en:
Stay period: End of May 2021. Booking via FHR Prepay. Booked Garden View room because I was concerned a no-view room might not upgrade and would be disappointing. Actually received an upgrade to Ocean View. Held Gold hotel membership (from Platinum card).

SNP/Member benefits included: SNP, 5x points, 100 credit, 200 reimbursement, welcome gift, double breakfast, 4pm late checkout.

Check-in required showing and swiping the Platinum card for FHR benefits eligibility. I didn't bring the card used for booking since I'd just opened a new Platinum for opening spend, but the check-in agent allowed using the new card instead (same cardholder name) — a bit of an unusual data point.

Many online reviews mentioned the hotel feeling dated, but I found it quite nice. The interior decoration is retro-styled and the bathroom sink counter is small, but other furnishings are well-designed.

Service was excellent. The welcome gift was thoughtful and practical. The body wash effectively removed sunscreen (unlike at another property). The shared pool and beach with the adjacent Sheraton were high quality.

Post-pandemic, most good Waikiki restaurants require reservations, including this one. Unable to secure a dinner reservation, I ate lunch at the breakfast restaurant. Both breakfast and lunch were quite good.

reviews.author: Scott
reviews.content_original: 三家FHR曾是皇室行宫，近年轮流当过印度酒店No. 1，入住都说是"our best suite/villa"。服务无可挑剔。都没有客房，带独立的祷告室，配管家，客人离开房间会换水果，早上门口地面会摆鲜花，Udaivilas有独立泳池。泡澡备品是天然香料。
reviews.content_en: Former royal palace now recognized as one of India's top hotels. Impeccable service. Rooms include private prayer chamber and butler service. Fresh fruit replaced during guest absence, flowers arranged at door each morning. Private pool available. Bath amenities feature natural aromatics.

reviews.author: Scott
reviews.content_original: Lake Palace对岸就是Oberoi Udaivilas。三家FHR曾是皇室行宫。暑期淡季，客人少。Lake Palace湖边亭廊上的蓝色装饰学习了泰姬陵的装潢工艺——在乳白色的某种石头上凿出凹槽，再把蓝色的晶石砌到里面。
reviews.content_en: Located across the lake from Oberoi Udaivilas. Former royal palace. Low occupancy during summer off-season. Lakeside pavilion features intricate blue stone inlay work inspired by Taj Mahal architecture—blue crystals inset into carved grooves in milky stone.

reviews.author: Scott
reviews.content_original: 三家里面最喜欢的Rambagh养了很多孔雀，四处弥漫着淡淡的茉莉花香。Rambagh高尔夫球场putting green级别的草地。三家宫殿都200+年历史，建筑考究。餐厅可选室内/户外用餐，户外有笛子/鼓演奏。
reviews.content_en: Favorite of the three palaces. Peacocks roaming grounds with jasmine fragrance throughout. Golf course with championship-quality greens. Over 200 years of history with meticulous architecture. Dining available indoors or outdoors with flute and drum performances in garden.

reviews.author: cchu1109
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Biltmore Hotel Miami Coral Gables
入住时段：21年8 月12-13
预定渠道：FHR Prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：Deluxe King 丐房 / Anastasia
會員：沒有
SNP/会员福利：什麼都沒有
Resort fee, 可以用在那100 credit, 去之前談了個心升了好幾級，餐廳不貴，真心漂亮這酒店，女朋友一直拍照沒停過，100 credit 前台說去gift shop 買雪茄，酒，衣服都可以，連Valet 都可用用，個人覺得不錯，ps 第一住FHR
reviews.content_en: Resort fee covered by $100 credit. Negotiated upgrades before arrival and received several suite upgrades. Restaurant is reasonably priced. The hotel is genuinely beautiful—girlfriend couldn't stop taking photos. The $100 credit can be used at the gift shop for cigars, alcohol, clothing, and even valet service. Overall very satisfied. P.S. This was my first FHR stay.

reviews.author: yang_gao
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes. All SNP benefits received. Hotel credit (100 total) distributed as 40 for dining (Platinum members receive 30% discount) and 60 for spa (not utilized). Points can be registered to travel companion's account.
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：天津丽思卡尔顿酒店

入住时段：21年5月

预定渠道：FHR Prepay

预定房型/实际入住房型：定的基础房，谈心后升级到了基础套房

酒店会员：Marriott Gold

SNP/会员福利：SNP都给了,还可以把积分登记到同住人那里。LD的会员等级更高一些，就把分记到她那里了。入住送的100credit估计被薅怕了，特地分成了两部分；40可以用在dining，60在spa。spa巨贵所以就没有尝试。dining的话platinum会员可以打7折，还是挺划算的

备注：这个酒店虽然是13年开业的，但是保养的非常好，满满的欧式风格，大堂的月季也很香。除此之外酒店还有挺多艺术品，称得上一个小型的博物馆。酒店位置就在五大道附近，十分惬意。就是天津这个城市感觉被北京吸血越来越严重，发展有些停滞了。
reviews.content_en:
Hotel Name: Tianjin Ritz-Carlton Hotel

Stay Period: May 2021

Booking Channel: FHR Prepay

Booked/Actual Room Type: Booked a basic room, upgraded to a basic suite after check-in

Hotel Membership: Marriott Gold

SNP/Membership Benefits: Received all SNP benefits. Points could be registered to travel companion's account. Travel companion had higher membership status, so points were registered under her account. The 100 hotel credit was split into two parts: 40 for dining and 60 for spa (the split was intentional, likely due to concern about generous usage). Didn't try spa due to high pricing. Platinum members receive 30% discount on dining, which offers good value.

Comments: Although the hotel opened in 2013, it's maintained in excellent condition with strong European aesthetic. The lobby roses smell wonderful. The hotel features numerous artworks, resembling a small museum. Located near Wudadao (Five Roads), very pleasant area. However, Tianjin as a city appears increasingly drained by Beijing, with development seemingly stalled.

reviews.author: anon87878907
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：北京四季
入住时段：忘了
预定渠道：Centurion Concierge
实际入住房型：皇家套房
酒店会员：无

reviews.author: patrickwang
reviews.content_original: 定的乞丐房给升了一级。两个人给了65的早餐和100的property credit。早餐只能用在grand lux cafe和room service。grand lux cafe出品不错，推荐short rib Benedict 。property credit用在了酒店的Matteo意大利餐厅，整体还是很不错的，pork belly挺不错，ravioli吃起来像饺子
reviews.content_en: Booked a beggar room and was upgraded one level. Two people received $65 breakfast credit and $100 property credit. Breakfast only redeemable at Grand Lux Cafe and room service. Grand Lux Cafe has great quality, recommend the Short Rib Benedict. Used property credit at Matteo Italian restaurant in the hotel - overall very good, the pork belly was excellent, ravioli tasted like dumplings.

reviews.author: patrickwang
reviews.content_original: 定的乞丐resort king给升级到了renovated的premier king。但是，premier king没有浴缸！我和队友刚环线开回来当然是想要有浴缸的，于是打电话去撕。最后给升级到了高层喷泉view的Queen。房间view很好，正对喷泉和Paris hotel，但是是没有翻新过的，设施都有点老了。而且正对strip其实是很吵的…喷泉一直到晚上12点，房间隔音也不好，隔壁大半夜放音乐直接把人吵醒。早餐给了60credit，但是他们家的吃的很overpriced，随便点了点就用完了。100刀的餐饮credit可以用在几乎所有mgm餐厅（除了鼎泰丰）我懒得走就用在了Bellagio的buffet。千万不要去！Bellagio的buffet选项之少出品之差像是20刀的buffet（但是加上税小费差不多50多一人了）。50多的buffet连蟹腿都没有你敢信
reviews.content_en: Booked a beggar resort king and was upgraded to a renovated premier king. However, the premier king had no bathtub! After driving the scenic loop, we naturally wanted a bathtub, so we called to complain. Finally upgraded to a high floor fountain-view Queen. The room view was excellent, facing the fountain and Paris Hotel directly, but it wasn't renovated, and the facilities were a bit old. Plus, facing the Strip is actually very noisy... the fountain runs until midnight, the room soundproofing is poor, and neighbors playing music in the middle of the night woke us up. Breakfast credit was $60, but their food is very overpriced - just ordered a bit randomly and used it all up. The $100 dining credit can be used at almost all MGM restaurants (except Din Tai Fung). I was too lazy to walk so used it at Bellagio's buffet. Don't go there! Bellagio's buffet has minimal options and poor quality - it's like a $20 buffet (but with tax and tip it comes to over $50 per person). A $50+ buffet without even crab legs - can you believe it?

reviews.author: patrickwang
reviews.content_original: 应该是三家里面最新的，酒店比较商务的感觉。在strip的最南边很多人觉得远，但是其实有免费的tram。check in的时候是一个asian的大妈态度很冷淡也没有给房间升级（和我说满了但是我看网站上明明还有很多空房）。新酒店房间设施还是很舒服的。一样60刀早餐100刀餐饮。60刀早餐只能用在酒店的cafe，十分鸡肋，吃的都是和星巴克一样提前做好reheat的。酒店很多设施都是共用mandalay bay的，泳池有lazy river和人造浪十分不错
reviews.content_en: Should be the newest of the three. The hotel has a fairly business-like feel. Located on the far south end of the Strip - many think it's far, but there's actually a free tram. During check-in, an Asian lady was cold in attitude and didn't give a room upgrade (said it was full but I saw plenty of rooms available on the website). Being a new hotel, the room facilities are still quite comfortable. Same $60 breakfast and $100 dining credit. The $60 breakfast can only be used at the hotel's cafe - very impractical, all pre-made and reheated like Starbucks. Many of the hotel's facilities are shared with Mandalay Bay. The pool is excellent - it has a lazy river and wave machine.

reviews.author: brokenarcher
reviews.content_original: check in的姐一看就不熟悉业务，帮我们都弄完了才发现是FHR，不问她还不查升级，问了才说let me check，最后很不情愿的给了个fountain view，但房间还没好让我们先等着说会短信通知。这姐把FHR福利打出来直接递给我们让我们自己看，这冷淡的服务态度我是很服气的（相比之下Wynn的小姐姐给我们把福利一条条的读，后来咨询一个benefit的时候大叔给我们又一条条解释了一遍）。等了一个半小时还没收到短信打电话问，说房间已经好了，电话里的姐一直强调FHR的upgrade和early check in都是upon availability， 意思是就算让我等也是正常的，挺无语的。领房卡换了个姐，服务好了很多，笑脸相迎，还帮我们升级到了高点的楼层，可是依旧没有salone suite的upgrade。早餐$30 credit只能用在三个地方，sadelle's (upscale breakfast restaurant)和两个cafe (any time during the stay)。sadelle的早餐看menu非常overpriced，基本30吃不够，另外俩cafe感觉又很一般，所以我们最后去了wicked spoon（万豪会员插队实在太爽），回来后在cafe买咖啡冰激凌用掉了这些credit，食物水准不高。总之早餐可以用的餐厅太少怎么用都不太合适。$100 food credit好用多了，所有的MGM餐厅酒吧只要能charge to room就都算，本来想用在buffet的，但进去看了一圈buffet水准实在是扎心，还好意思收$50/人。最后用来pool side买酒，一杯32oz收费$30+tax，不过因为是刚需所以也只能感叹这黑心的价格。总的来说，满分5分的话，location 5分，service 3分，FHR experience 4分。fountain view还是挺香的，电视调到channel 22还能听现场的音乐。
reviews.content_en: The check-in staff wasn't familiar with FHR procedures. They completed the check-in before realizing it was FHR and only upgraded us after I asked—reluctantly upgraded to fountain view, though the room wasn't ready so they said they'd send an SMS. The staff just handed me the FHR benefits printout to read myself, which reflected a cold attitude (unlike the Wynn staff who explained the benefits line by line, and later a manager explained it again). After waiting 90 minutes without an SMS, I called and was told the room was ready. The phone staff kept emphasizing that upgrades and early check-in were upon availability. When I picked up the key, a different staff member was much friendlier and even upgraded me to a higher floor, but still no suite upgrade. The $30 breakfast credit was only usable at three places: Sadelle's (upscale breakfast) and two cafes. Sadelle's menu was overpriced—$30 wasn't enough. The cafes seemed mediocre, so we ended up at Wicked Spoon (Marriott members get priority, which was great). Later we used the credits at a cafe for coffee and ice cream. The breakfast options were limited regardless. The $100 food credit was much more flexible—usable at any MGM restaurant that allows room charges. The buffet looked disappointing at $50/person, so we ended up buying drinks poolside ($30+ for 32oz). Overall: location 5/5, service 3/5, FHR experience 4/5. The fountain view was nice—Channel 22 had live music.

reviews.author: brokenarcher
reviews.hotel_name_original: Conrad at Las Vegas Resorts World
reviews.hotel_name_en: Conrad at Las Vegas Resorts World
reviews.content_original: 本坛第一篇Conrad LVRW入住体验？六月底新开的，抱着尝鲜顺便刷Aspire resort credit的心态订的。因为是周五晚，最早定的时候现金价在乞丐房$250+tax，订semi-flex正好报销了credit，临走前两周发现大幅降价，strip view价格在$200左右，expedia更是另外30% off，最后定了strip view，price match后最终价格$100+tax美滋滋。到店因为invited guests排队太久被带到VIP check in，小哥态度非常不错，说有个1 king suite可以升级，但因为满房所以没有strip view suite，不过讲真的RW的位置太偏了就算strip view也没啥好看的，而且门前就是Wynn家还没开发的lot，一大片建筑工地+停车场。事实证明1 king suite还是不错的，只是觉得内饰没有达到conrad该有的档次，可能是因为上面还有个crockford压着没法做太好。早餐有$25 credit本来以为到处都能用，不过其实一共只能用在三个餐厅: buffet style的the kitchen，盗版eggslut的suns out buns out，pool side的Agave。The kitchen作为vegas buffet简直是羞耻，进去看了一圈加上水果一共大概10个菜，还收$40/人。想了想决定用在suns out buns out，早上排队的人还挺多，大概20分钟左右，$25可以买一个breakfast sandwich+一杯饮料，味道还挺不错的，推荐short ribs sandwich。酒店非常新！！大堂及casino都有一股香味，房间稍微有点装修的味道，比起别的酒店绝对是change of scenery。casino边上有food court美其名曰famous foods，基本都是亚州小吃，有日式烤串、饺子、炒果条、牛肉面、绵绵冰。我们当晚随便点了些charge to room，最后check out的时候小姐姐全都给我们waive了。酒店66楼有starlight lounge，是个strip view的bar，本来我们是想去喝一杯的，但他们有minimum 2 drinks/person，酒都非常overpriced。我们唯一感觉有点气的是他家的服务，body wash刚到就空瓶，有咖啡机没给准备咖啡杯和胶囊，打电话给前台催了两三次都没resolve，胶囊送来了结果还是没有咖啡杯。不过后来nespresso的胶囊大方地送了一整条。总而言之，新酒店在硬件上是毫无疑问的优秀；因为刚开的关系服务还没完全跟上；位置非常偏；但酒店啥都有所以没有刚需的话不用出去。
reviews.content_en: Possibly the first Conrad LVRW review on this forum? It opened at the end of June. I booked it to try a new property and use my Aspire resort credit. Since it was Friday night, the initial cash rate for a basic room was $250+tax. I booked semi-flexible to reimburse the credit. Two weeks before arrival, prices dropped significantly—strip view was around $200, and Expedia had an additional 30% off. I rebooked strip view and after price matching, got it for $100+tax. At check-in, because of long invited guest queues, I was taken to VIP check-in where the staff was very friendly. They offered to upgrade to a 1-bed king suite, but couldn't offer a strip view suite due to full occupancy. Honestly, Resorts World's location is awkward—even a strip view doesn't show much, and there's just a construction site and parking lot in front. The 1-bed suite turned out nice, though the decor didn't match Conrad's usual standard, probably limited by Crockford's above. The $25 breakfast credit was only valid at three venues: The Kitchen (buffet), Suns Out Buns Out (knockoff Eggslut), and poolside Agave. The Kitchen is embarrassing as a Vegas buffet—only about 10 items plus fruit, charging $40/person. I used it at Suns Out Buns Out where there was a 20-minute wait. $25 got a breakfast sandwich and drink—the short ribs sandwich was really good. The hotel is brand new with pleasant scents throughout the lobby and casino, though rooms had a slight renovation smell. Next to the casino is a food court called Famous Foods with Asian street food—Japanese grilled skewers, dumplings, chow fun, beef noodles, baobing, etc. We ordered room service one evening and the staff waived everything at checkout. The 66th floor has Starlight Lounge with strip views, but minimum 2 drinks per person and overpriced drinks deterred us. The only frustration was service issues: body wash arrived empty, no coffee cups or capsules provided with the coffee machine despite several front desk calls. Capsules eventually arrived without cups. However, they generously sent a full sleeve of Nespresso capsules. Overall: hardware is indisputably excellent; service hasn't caught up yet due to recent opening; location is very remote; but the hotel has everything so no need to leave. Now it's included in FHR which offers $100 food credit + $30x2 FHR breakfast credit + $25x2 Diamond breakfast credit = $210 total, which seems great value if you find a cheap rate.

reviews.author: bumblebee
reviews.content_original: Delano你问前台要升级了吗？FHR保证至少升一级的。我8月住了两次，第一次直接升到Penthouse，第二次strip view corner suite
reviews.content_en: Did you ask the front desk about upgrades at Delano? FHR guarantees at least one room upgrade. I stayed twice in August - the first time I was upgraded directly to a Penthouse, the second time to a strip view corner suite.

reviews.author: Joeysocal
reviews.actual_room_type: Mixed - Standard Room and Lakeview Room
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 Food credit, free breakfast, 4PM check-out, discounted canoeing ($99 CAD) with priority line access
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Fairmont Chateau Lake Louise

入住时段：21年9月Labor Day Weekend

预定渠道：FHR Prepay

预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房 / Lakeview room(正对路易斯湖，绝美)

酒店会员：NA

SNP/会员福利：NA / $100 Food credit, Free breakfast, 4PM check-out, 划船discounted price and priority line

实际我和LD各订一晚。我的一晚房间并没有升级，也没有给early check-in，但是有欢迎礼(一瓶Sparkling water和三块甜品)

LD的一晚虽然没有欢迎礼，但是房间升级到正对路易斯湖的Lakeview Room，太太太美了。。。

酒店餐厅里，Lakeview lounge有一扇正对湖的大窗(table-to-ceiling window), 号称"世界之窗"，适合发某红书。Fairview bar&restaurant 也有几扇稍小的大窗，位置稍偏但景观也不错。两个餐馆都建议提前预约，尤其是Afternoon tea是不能预约当天的。

酒店客人划船价格优惠(CAD$99)，并且可以走priority line直接到队伍最前面。被插的三哥特别不满，说我们都排了一个多小时了怎么他们可以直接过去。。。哈哈Sorry : )
reviews.content_en:
Hotel: Fairmont Chateau Lake Louise

Stay period: September 2021, Labor Day Weekend

Booking channel: FHR Prepay

Booked room type/Actual room type: Economy room / Lakeview room (directly overlooking Lake Louise, absolutely stunning)

Hotel membership: NA

SNP/Membership benefits: NA / $100 Food credit, Free breakfast, 4PM check-out, discounted canoeing with priority line

Actually, my partner and I each booked one night. My night didn't have a room upgrade or early check-in, but we received a welcome gift (sparkling water and three desserts).

My partner's night didn't have a welcome gift, but the room was upgraded to the Lakeview Room directly overlooking Lake Louise—absolutely gorgeous.

The hotel restaurants: the Lakeview Lounge has a floor-to-ceiling window directly facing the lake, dubbed the "Window of the World" and perfect for social media. The Fairview Bar & Restaurant also has several slightly smaller windows with decent views. Both restaurants require advance reservations, especially Afternoon Tea which cannot be booked the same day.

Hotel guests receive discounted canoeing rates (CAD$99) and can skip the line with priority access. Some other guests who had waited 1+ hour were quite unhappy about this. Haha, sorry!

reviews.author: RedBlaze
reviews.actual_room_type: Luxury King Suite with Strip View
reviews.content_original: $100 credit用在了Chica，餐馆还行。$65早饭credit用在了Grand Lux Cafe，点的东西两个人吃了3顿才吃完。没有用到提前入住推迟退房的福利。
reviews.content_en: $100 credit used at Chica, restaurant was decent. $65 breakfast credit used at Grand Lux Cafe, dishes ordered lasted three meals for two people. Did not use early check-in and late check-out benefits.
