reviews.actual_room_type: Luxury King One bedroom with Strip View
reviews.content_original: $100 credit用在MGM noodle餐馆,要訂位。$65 breakfast credit只能用在primrose Cafe, $100我們沒有用完，剩下$10直接減resort fee
reviews.content_en: $100 credit used at MGM noodle restaurant, reservation required. $65 breakfast credit can only be used at Primrose Cafe. Didn't use full $100, remaining $10 directly deducted from resort fee.

reviews.author: z916055929
reviews.hotel_name_original: The Duniway Portland, a Hilton Hotel
reviews.hotel_name_en: The Duniway Portland, a Hilton Hotel
reviews.booked_room_type: Street View High Floor budget room
reviews.actual_room_type: Street View High Floor budget room
reviews.content_original: $100 credit 和 $30x2 双早可以直接当任何credit用，包括停车小费吧台早餐，然而早餐是个普通的Buffet，只有鸡蛋，面包，肉饼，和酸奶咖啡什么的。推荐的是晚上的bar，鸡尾酒你报名字，他能调就会给你做。
reviews.content_en: $100 credit and $30x2 dual breakfast can be used as any credit including parking, tips, bar, breakfast. Breakfast is regular buffet with eggs, bread, sausage, yogurt, and coffee. Evening bar highly recommended, cocktails made to order.

reviews.author: tibo
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes, SNP and welcome fruit platter received
reviews.content_original: FHR住二送一，有$100刀credit。酒店餐厅只有一家，中餐和意餐的融合。有65加币的tasting menu，有一说一，意面还可以。不过温哥华那么多好吃的，还是不要把一顿晚饭的份额浪费在酒店餐厅。早餐是点餐制，每天都是一样的menu。喝个咖啡可以，吃的还是算了吧。酒店位置很好，软硬件都挺不错，除了餐厅。
reviews.content_en: FHR stay two nights get one free, $100 credit. Hotel has one restaurant with fusion Sino-Italian cuisine. CAD 65 tasting menu, pasta is decent. But with so many great options in Vancouver, don't waste a dinner allocation here. Breakfast is à la carte with same menu daily. Coffee ok, food skip. Excellent location, solid facilities, except restaurant.

reviews.author: Jackey_j
reviews.content_original: $100 credit可以用在 120 + MGM餐馆。$65 breakfast credit只能用在primrose Cafe, $100我們沒有用完，剩下的直接減resort fee
reviews.content_en: $100 credit can be used at 120+ MGM restaurant. $65 breakfast credit can only be used at Primrose Cafe. Didn't use full $100, remaining deducted from resort fee.

reviews.author: happypants
reviews.content_original: 100$随便用，但餐厅不咋好吃。白金会员7折和100$ double dip YMMV.
reviews.content_en: $100 credit available for any use, but restaurant food was mediocre. Platinum member 30% discount and $100 double dip YMMV.

reviews.author: MKLDH
reviews.hotel_name_original: Vogue Hotel Montreal Downtown, a Hilton Hotel
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes, SNP received, but no Hilton Gold breakfast credit
reviews.content_original: 价格很实惠，尤其是考虑到店内消费CAD相当于打八折。公共区域略旧，房间内饰还好。晚餐和早餐都在酒店唯一的餐厅。正餐品质一般，早餐质量倒是不错（30美刀x2随便点）
reviews.content_en: Very good value, especially considering in-hotel spending CAD equates to 20% discount. Common areas slightly dated, room decor decent. Dinner and breakfast at hotel's only restaurant. Regular menu quality average, breakfast quality good ($30 USD x2 for any selection).

reviews.author: PPCkkt
reviews.content_original: 房子超级新，服务非常贴心，感觉算是住过马里奥里面服务很好的了，早餐算是平平无奇，除了燕麦粥都是冷的，周六周日 rooftop可以看disney焰火，去旁边的convention center开会也蛮方便的
reviews.content_en: Room brand new, service very thoughtful, feels like one of the best serviced Marriott properties. Breakfast unremarkable, everything cold except oatmeal. Rooftop has Disney fireworks view on weekends. Convention center nearby convenient for meetings.

reviews.author: KaitouKiddo
reviews.content_original: 房间虽然看起来有点老了，但是服务还是不错的。给了100的spa credit没用上，早餐给了一人30的credit可以在楼下餐厅用。
reviews.content_en: Room looks a bit dated, but service is still decent. Received $100 spa credit which went unused. Breakfast provided $30 per person credit for restaurant downstairs.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.booked_room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Double Beds, City View
reviews.actual_room_type: Grand Room, 2 Double Beds, City View
reviews.content_original: 房间有可能可以合并， 福利共享是不大可能的。 FHR的酒店会和AMEX结账，一般比较难水。这家的宴庭味道不错，没有点硬核粤菜，100刀够三个人吃。P6+有双人happy hour，没去，换了多一个人的早餐。欢迎礼选了1000分，SNP到账了，这1000分至今没收到。说了N次要一份eFolio至今未收到。第一天进出一次以后三张房卡就都用不了了，第一次找前台重做等了半天前台拿了卡还在忙别的就直接出去玩了… 回来以后拿卡发现每张卡刷电梯都是所有楼层都会亮。
reviews.content_en: The restaurant has good flavors, nothing too hardcore. $100 credit was enough for three people. P6+ members get two-person happy hour but I didn't go, instead exchanged for extra breakfast. Chose welcome gift of 1000 points which was credited but haven't received yet. Asked multiple times for an eFolio, never received. After the first day, all three room cards stopped working. After the first repair at front desk, discovered all cards now light up all floors on the elevator.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.snp_stacking: Suite upgrade for Silver Elite members
reviews.content_original: 这家会给FHR预定的小白金升套，住了两次都升了，十分厚道… 房间实际观感比图片好很多。早餐严格两份，不能用100刀买。100刀一次吃了自助晚餐、刚好是10月份的螃蟹主题，有各种做法螃蟹… 另一次吃了丽轩，价格整体比宴庭略高，没有点硬核粤菜，前菜和主菜份量极端（极少vs.暴多），汤不错… 不过这两餐都没有隔壁宴庭好吃… 两次都是100刀+额外150软吃了三个人 整体服务比隔壁瑞吉强很多… 除了欢迎水果，第一次送了一盒很好吃的杏仁酥，第二次送了一些摆得很好看的甜点
reviews.content_en: They upgrade FHR-booked Silver Elite members to suites. Upgraded both stays, very generous. The room looks even better in person than in photos. Breakfast is strictly two servings, cannot use $100 credit for breakfast. One $100 credit was used for self-service dinner with crab theme in October with various crab preparations. Another time had Li Xuan restaurant, slightly higher priced than Yan Ting, no hardcore Cantonese. Appetizer and entree portions were extreme (very small vs. massive), soup was good. But both meals weren't as good as Yan Ting next door. Both times used $100 credit plus extra 150 CNY for three people. Overall service much better than St. Regis next door. Besides welcome fruit, first time received a box of delicious almond cookies, second time received nicely arranged desserts.

reviews.author: Eddie
reviews.booked_room_type: Garden View Double Bed Basic Room
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP received, extra breakfast for one person
reviews.content_original: 本来是订的两晚亚龙湾万豪，结果有房的情况下还把套房券拒了只给升级豪华园景，于是果断取消了… 刚好看到又有FHR800-150的offer了，加上后面要转场柏悦、FHR有保证4PM退房，遂改成这家。这家在飞客的风评很差，但是这次实际入住的体验挺好的… 本来要的泳池房，到的时候还没打扫出来，管家带去看了间园景套，花园景+山景+海影的组合也蛮不错的，于是拿了园景套。多送了一个人的早餐。这家迷你吧免费。欢迎水果品种比前两家多，当然还是比不上上海浦东丽思。
reviews.content_en: Originally booked two nights at Yalong Bay Marriott, but they refused the suite certificate even with rooms available and only offered deluxe garden view upgrade, so I cancelled. Happened to see FHR 800-150 offer and since I needed to move to Park Hyatt later with FHR's guaranteed 4PM checkout, switched to this hotel. Has poor reviews on Fei Ke but this stay was actually quite good. Wanted a pool-view room but it wasn't cleaned yet, manager brought me to see a garden-view suite with garden + mountain + sea view combo which was nice, so took the suite. Got extra breakfast for one person. Mini bar is free. Welcome fruit variety better than the previous two, though not as good as Shanghai Pudong Ritz-Carlton.

reviews.author: brizyyy
reviews.content_original: 我们到的时候比较早，放行李到前台时只是说升级 corner room。实际 checkin 时最后升级到了酒店最大的 suite，酒店餐饮很普通。
reviews.content_en: We arrived early. When dropping off luggage at the front desk, they only mentioned upgrading to a corner room. At actual check-in, we were finally upgraded to the hotel's largest suite. Hotel dining is ordinary.

reviews.author: Jizz5566
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP and welcome gift (2 bottles Evian water, handwritten card, Black Forest cake)
reviews.content_original: 4 PM退房、2人早餐（套餐式）、$100 credit转换台币汇率给予$2800，用于饭店餐点上，提前预定招牌烤鸭，入住后加点其他Menu餐点送房内用，价格也非常六星级，精打细算下只超过200多 NTD，本以为餐量少吃不饱，但后来多到吃不下。餐点非常美味。另外给予6瓶装Uni矿泉水for free。服务也极佳。唯一美中不足的是退房后多收了我2瓶Evian水费用，去信后告知是会员招待，等待退款中。
reviews.content_en: 4 PM checkout, 2-person breakfast (set menu), $100 credit converted to TWD 2800 for restaurant dining. Pre-ordered signature roasted duck, added other menu items for in-room delivery. Prices are very luxury standard but with careful planning, only exceeded by 200+ NTD. Thought portions would be small but ended up too much to finish. Food was delicious. Also received 6-pack Uni mineral water for free. Service was excellent. Only downside: overcharged 2 bottles of Evian water at checkout, but after inquiry they said it was a member courtesy and refund is pending.

reviews.author: hermione
reviews.hotel_name_original: The Fives Downtown Hotel & Residences, Curio Collection by Hilton in Playa del Carmen
reviews.hotel_name_en: The Fives Downtown Hotel & Residences, Curio Collection by Hilton
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：The Fives Downtown Hotel & Residences, Curio Collection by Hilton in Playa del Carmen

入住时段：12/2021

预定渠道：THC

预定房型/实际入住房型：Deluxe Room (乞丐房）/ 升一级（初级套房）

酒店会员：水钻

SNP/会员福利：有SNP/早饭

备注：1晚点数+2晚THC。35k HH，THC价150刀每晚，官网才100刀不到，markup太厉害了吧。提前收到邮件说因为水钻升级，之后订的别家FN也升级了，所以我觉得THC的升级没啥卵用。Check in的时候需要提100刀credit，不然他们会（装作）不知道。

位置非常方便，pool也不错因为楼够高可以看到海景。Roof top点了章鱼/taco/意饺都挺好吃，章鱼强烈推荐。Room service点了最贵的菲力牛排，是我这辈子吃过最难吃的牛排。很努力了但是100刀还是没用完。
reviews.content_en:
Booked 1 night with points + 2 nights THC. 35k HHonors at $150/night via THC, compared to under $100 on official website—markup is excessive. Received advance email about platinum upgrade, which also applied to later FHR bookings, so THC upgrade seems pointless. At check-in, must request the $100 credit or they'll pretend not to know about it.

Location very convenient, pool nice with ocean views from the height. Rooftop had octopus, tacos, and spinach ravioli—all good, octopus highly recommended. Room service ordered the most expensive filet mignon, worst steak I've ever eaten. Despite effort, couldn't finish the $100 credit.

reviews.author: xiaoxiaoX
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：loews ventana canyon tucson

入住时段：周日

预定渠道：FHR

预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房/乞丐房

酒店会员：无

SNP/会员福利：无

备注：设施比较老 维修巨慢 晚上空调坏了两个小时才有人来修还没修好 因为要睡觉熬不动了就要了个小加热器对付一晚上
reviews.content_en: Facilities quite old, maintenance extremely slow. AC broke at night, took two hours for someone to arrive and still wasn't fixed. Couldn't stay up waiting so had to ask for a small heater to get through the night.

reviews.author: tobit
reviews.content_original: 一大早本来说寄存行李被告知房间ready所以也没在乎suite。住到一半发现resort fee在账单上找前台问情况，说了一堆乱七八糟不靠谱的东西但是最后同意给经理发邮件，之后resort fee被免。酒店硬件还不错，但是软件较差。房间空调和浴缸都坏了，但是来修的还算及时，也不是大问题，大概半小时就修好了。餐饮极差，早餐20%上座率能等上菜等40分钟，最后一天黑莓里还吃出虫子。周末早餐有buffet或者点餐（两个菜单），领位的直接说今天只有buffet，我们本来也无所谓就是想吃buffet，以为他们忙不过来了所以只有buffet。进去以后看到之前的人再吃点餐的食物（我之前一天点的餐），结果在我们后面进来的人也开始点餐，观感不太好。
reviews.content_en: Early in the morning I was told the room was ready when I wanted to store luggage, so I didn't care about the suite. Midway through the stay I discovered resort fees on the bill and asked the front desk. They gave a bunch of unreliable explanations but eventually agreed to email the manager, after which the resort fee was waived. The hotel hardware is decent but service is poor. The AC and bathtub in the room were broken, but repairs came fairly quickly and weren't a major issue—fixed in about 30 minutes. Dining was terrible. At breakfast with only 20% occupancy we waited 40 minutes for food; on the last day I found an insect in blackberries. Weekend breakfast offered buffet or à la carte (two menus), but the host said buffet only today. We were fine either way wanting buffet—we thought they were too busy. But once inside we saw previous guests eating à la carte food (what I had ordered the day before), and then guests arriving after us also started ordering à la carte. The impression wasn't great.

reviews.author: Oddinaaaaaa
reviews.actual_room_type: Budget double room, slightly higher floor
reviews.snp_stacking: yes - $25 mini bar/welcome credit, $30 per person per day breakfast credit, $100 SPA credit
reviews.content_original: 可能是因为当天四五点才办入住所以房子都没得差不多了。基本上是所有credit都用到了胡吃海喝。Tableau八点半还是八点多少之前不开外面所以如果是预定的话记得小心时间。感觉一般，物价偏贵。Jardin相当可以，view来说虽然外面是开的但是相对一般，但是食物很不错！龙虾benedict好吃，花盆小蛋糕巨甜无比，就是拍个照，拍照好看。价格也算是可以接受。Urth Cafe朋友去吃了，觉得也比较甜。我喝了奶茶，相当一般，喝完心跳加速。SPA就是和朋友去做了个classic facial。里面设施一般特别小一个，但是脸做得很舒服！很满意！因为Vegas太干了做脸救命。Wynn的赌场人茫茫多还一股烟味…还不如在ping pang pong那个赌场赌，旧但是闻起来不臭…
reviews.content_en: Probably because check-in wasn't until 4-5pm, most rooms were taken. We basically used all the credits for eating and drinking. Tableau doesn't open until around 8:30 so if booking remember to watch the time. Overall average, prices are expensive. Jardin is quite good—the view outside is open but relatively average, but the food is excellent! Lobster benedict is delicious, the pot-shaped small cake is incredibly sweet, very photogenic. The price is acceptable. A friend went to Urth Cafe and also found it quite sweet. I had milk tea, quite mediocre, felt my heart racing after drinking. For the SPA we did a classic facial with a friend. The facilities are modest and cramped, but the facial itself was very comfortable! Very satisfied! Vegas is so dry, the facial treatment was lifesaving. Wynn's casino was packed with people and smells like cigarettes...I'd rather gamble at the ping pang pong casino—it's old but doesn't smell bad...

reviews.author: Sheriaty
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Shangri-La Vancouver。入住时段：11/26/2021。预定渠道：FHR prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型： superior（乞丐）king/deluxe king。酒店会员：没会员。SNP/会员福利：早餐+100美刀（119加刀，问的前台）credit。备注：不知道是不是因为白板会员都没有所以没见到什么欢迎果盘。。因为是当天上午预定晚上入住可能比较匆忙，想要的crib没有了，到了之后要了extra bed。这extra bed是我睡过的最难受的床了。。比某些地板都不舒服。。checkin/out的时间也都没有用到福利。100刀credit没啥地方好花，不过停车钱可以算在里面（差不多一半没了），拿了点零食别的也没点啥。。应该去喝一杯的。。早餐的主菜在水果smoothie之后等了很久（~30分钟）都没到，娃都烦了只好要了打包走。。到现在还没收到什么fhr问卷。。好想好想吐槽一下extra bed。。住的整体还可以，没怎么住过好酒店。。
reviews.content_en: Stayed at Shangri-La Vancouver on 11/26/2021 via FHR prepay. Booked a superior king but received deluxe king. No hotel membership. Benefits: breakfast + $100 CAD food credit (confirmed at front desk). No welcome amenities visible, possibly due to having no elite status. Booked same morning for evening check-in so rushed. Requested crib wasn't available, added extra bed instead—uncomfortable bed, worse than sleeping on floor. Check-in/check-out times didn't allow using benefits. $100 credit not many places to use, but covered parking (about half). Only bought snacks. Should have had a drink. Waited ~30 minutes for main breakfast course after fruit smoothie, never arrived—child got bored so took it to go. Haven't received FHR survey yet. Overall stay acceptable, not used to high-end hotels.

reviews.author: Dddbx
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Dusit Thani Guam。入住时段： Thanksgiving weekend。预定渠道： FHR Prepaid。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房/基础套。酒店会员：NA。SNP/会员福利：$100 food credit。备注：我村唯一一家FHR， 他家牛排馆一流 这次$100credit 用在他家泰餐，味道欢迎不错 非常overprice,其他地方中规中矩。
reviews.content_en: Only FHR option in my town. Their steakhouse is excellent. Used $100 credit at their Thai restaurant this time—flavors were delightful, very overpriced. Other dining areas are average.

reviews.author: EricandK
reviews.snp_stacking: $25 mini bar/welcome credit (first day only), $30 per person per day breakfast credit, $100 SPA credit (usable at dining)
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Encore Las Vegas。入住时段：11/23-11/25。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐大床房/33层的乞丐大床房。酒店会员：无。SNP/会员福利：$25 mini bar/welcome credit，$30/人/天早餐credit，$100 SPA credit。备注：我一张卡订了4间房。$25 mini bar/welcome credit只能第一天用。$100 SPA credit和前台确定可以用在dining。吃了wazuzu，感觉一般，菠萝饭还可以，海鲜面海鲜挺多的，就是面感觉都没熟。jardin环境好，味道也还可以。我们只吃了一天的早饭，check out的时候前台主动把第二天早餐的credit用在了dining上，最后只付了两顿饭的小费
reviews.content_en: Booked 4 rooms with one card. $25 mini bar/welcome credit only available first day. Confirmed with front desk that $100 SPA credit is usable at dining. Ate at Wazuzu—average, pineapple fried rice decent, seafood noodles had plenty of seafood but noodles seemed undercooked. Jardin had good ambiance and decent food. Only ate breakfast once; at checkout, front desk proactively applied second day breakfast credit to dining. Ended up only tipping on two meals.

reviews.author: Charon_pitt
reviews.actual_room_type: Deluxe Partial Ocean View with Terrace
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 food credit + $60 breakfast credit (no clear distinction, can combine)
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Asbury Ocean Club。入住时段： Thanksgiving 前一天。预定渠道： FHR Prepaid。预定房型/实际入住房型：Delux garden view/Delux partial ocean view with terrace。酒店会员：NA。SNP/会员福利：$100 food credit加$60早餐credit. 并没有明确区分可以一起用。备注：New Jersey 海边的一家resort,员工很友好，餐馆中上，鸡尾酒不错，有很棒的common area. 房间很大很新，而且有free parking!
reviews.content_en: New Jersey beachside resort. Staff very friendly. Restaurants above average, cocktails excellent, great common areas. Rooms large and new with free parking.

reviews.author: EricandK
reviews.snp_stacking: $30 per person per day breakfast credit, $100 dining credit (usable at 120 MGM dining outlets)
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Delano Las Vegas。入住时段：11/27-11/28。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐双床房/stay well双床房。酒店会员：MGM gold。SNP/会员福利：$30/人/天早餐credit，$100 dining credit。备注：我一张卡订了4间房，当天房间基本订完了，四间房都没给在一层。mini bar上放的两瓶1.5L矿泉水居然要收费，$22一瓶，巨坑爹，check out的时候让前台用breakfast credit付了。dining credit能用在mgm 120家餐厅里面，晚餐吃了楼下的LUPO, sea bass还可以，其他的一般，这个餐厅不在那个list里。list里午餐选择不多，用在了Bellagio的Noodles，普普通通。
reviews.content_en: Booked 4 rooms with one card; rooms sold out that day, four rooms not on same floor. Two 1.5L bottles of mineral water on mini bar charged at $22 each—ridiculous. Used breakfast credit to pay at checkout. Dining credit valid at 120 MGM restaurants. Dinner at ground floor LUPO—sea bass decent, rest average, this restaurant not on the list. Limited lunch options on list, used at Bellagio Noodles—mediocre.

reviews.author: 罗伯特
reviews.content_original: 位置在vail 小镇, valet parking only, 早餐极好 (有三文鱼皮当蛋卷的冰激凌, 带蜂巢的蜂蜜, etc.,), 非常欧式风情, 有年代感但不陈旧, 服务极好, invisible but always in sight, 前台要了冰, 到房间的时候就已经在冰桶里了.
reviews.content_en: Located in Vail town with valet parking only. Breakfast was excellent with creative offerings like salmon skin ice cream rolled in crepes with honeycomb honey. Very European style and charm with historic character but not outdated. Service was exceptional - attentive but unobtrusive. Requested ice at front desk and it was already in the bucket when arriving at the room.

reviews.author: Ccc1
reviews.content_original: 十层景观全无，credit也不能用在停车，房间也看不出有任何升级。总的感觉酒店不够厚道
reviews.content_en: No views from the 10th floor. Credit cannot be applied to parking. Room showed no visible upgrades. Overall impression is the hotel was not generous with its benefits.

reviews.author: herebjldn
reviews.content_original: 使用2021年度的FHR $200 credit，这家价格税后大约$240。$100额度点了一瓶红酒，聊胜于无，质量一般。前台仅看到是expedia预定带特殊权益，未能识别是FHR。客房设施尚可，能依稀看出时间痕迹。
reviews.content_en: Used 2021 FHR $200 credit. Room rate was approximately $240 after tax. Used $100 credit for a bottle of red wine - better than nothing but mediocre quality. Front desk only saw it as an Expedia booking with special privileges and did not recognize it as FHR. Room facilities were acceptable but showed signs of age.

reviews.author: herebjldn
reviews.snp_stacking: Member status but no additional member benefits applied
reviews.content_original: 使用2021年度的FHR $200 credit，这家价格税后大约$330。$100额度折人民币650元，可用于餐饮，包括顶楼酒吧，但税费服务费需另付。位置在深圳市中心，服务绝佳，服务绝佳，服务绝佳，但客房空间略显狭小，有部分房型可能有塔吊遮挡视野。
reviews.content_en: Used 2021 FHR $200 credit. Room rate was approximately $330 after tax. $100 credit converts to 650 RMB and can be used for dining including the rooftop bar, but taxes and service charges are separate. Located in Shenzhen city center with exceptional service. However, room space is somewhat cramped and some room types may have construction crane obstructions in the view.

reviews.author: goosekey
reviews.actual_room_type: 1 King Bed with Balcony, River View
reviews.hotel_membership: Omni Select (unable to add to booking)
reviews.snp_stacking: Free breakfast (excluding gratuity), $100 dining credit, no SNP benefits
reviews.content_original: 有开夜床，整个酒店服务都非常好，遇到的员工无一例外会点头微笑问好。楼下直通riverwalk，而且几步路就是riverwalk cruise的上船点，地点极佳。如果去San Antonio玩非常推荐入住这家酒店。
reviews.content_en: Turndown service was provided. Service throughout the hotel was exceptional - every staff member greeted us with a nod and smile. Direct access to River Walk downstairs, just a few steps to the River Walk cruise boarding area. Location is excellent. Highly recommended for anyone visiting San Antonio.

reviews.author: Mars
reviews.content_original: 前台小姐姐 人美声甜心善，自己的两张白金订了两天 小姐姐说我都给你安排好，不用CICO了，系统里我给你搞好明天160的credit直接reset。旁边大妈后来过来问有几个小朋友，然后给了几张去小孩游乐园的票。入住送了瓶红酒和零食，零食品质堪忧，trail mix还凑合。valet parking小哥颜都不错，服务水平差一些。房间整体满意，但是好像有虫或蚊子 没抓到 但是咬了一身包…
reviews.content_en: Front desk attendant was beautiful, sweet-voiced and helpful. I booked two nights with two platinum cards, and she said she'd arrange everything—no need to check in/out, and she's reset tomorrow's $160 credit in the system. Another guest asked about children and received tickets to a nearby kids' amusement park. Welcome amenities included a bottle of red wine and snacks (snacks quality was questionable, trail mix was decent). Valet parking attendant was good-looking but service level was mediocre. Room overall satisfactory, though appeared to have bugs or mosquitoes—didn't catch any but got bitten all over.

reviews.author: Rongye
reviews.snp_stacking: No SNP benefits noted; FHR benefits superseded Platinum status
reviews.content_original: 100刀用在了晚饭上，味道尚可，两个人一人一道主菜加半打生蚝刚好99。早餐非常给力，可以说是我在美国吃过最爽的酒店早餐！种类不能说繁多但是都很精致，吃得我相当满意。但是要吐槽的是酒店服务，入住当天早上九点多酒店就发邮件问有没有什么服务要求，我说希望晚上九点前开好夜床，酒店也回复邮件确认了。然而从我晚上八点入住到十一点半都没有人来开夜床，最后快睡了才有人上来送了几块巧克力……说实话有点不爽了。另外酒店游泳池也是极为袖珍，不知道是不是栗子的特色？总之这家栗子除了早餐以外没有任何让我觉得物有所值的地方，总价450刀减去200刀报销我都觉得不值，不是很推荐大家去烧credit。
reviews.content_en: Used $100 credit for dinner—taste was decent, two people ordering one entree each plus half a dozen oysters came to $99. Breakfast was excellent—honestly the best hotel breakfast I've had in America! While not abundant in variety, everything was well-executed and I was very satisfied. However, I must complain about hotel service. The hotel emailed asking about special requests on the morning of check-in, and I requested turndown service before 9pm. They confirmed via email. Yet from 8pm check-in until 11:30pm, nobody came to turn down the bed—finally near sleep time someone came up with a few chocolates. Frankly, quite disappointing. Also, the hotel pool is surprisingly small—not sure if that's typical for Ritz-Carlton? In summary, except for breakfast, this Ritz had nothing that felt worth the value. At $450 total minus $200 reimbursement, I still don't think it was worth it. Not really recommending you use credit here.

reviews.author: silentmovie
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 credit, 4pm guaranteed checkout, resort fee waived through Globalist, breakfast waived through Globalist (required communication)
reviews.content_original: 100刀credit，4pm guaranteed check out。resort fee: 这家resort fee包含valet parking，通过globalist免除resort fee就把valet parking也免了，不然paid stay一般不免parking。不过需要沟通，虽然这家短信系统还挺方便的。很爽快waive了resort fee。早餐：通过globalist免了，也需要沟通。这家还在ski early season, 不算贵的原因是几乎什么都不开。。中午目前只有一家cafe店开。而且物价巨贵，我们在cafe点了50多刀。。目前的dinner在conference hall里，也是巨贵。。当然滑雪还是方便的。
reviews.content_en: $100 credit, 4pm guaranteed checkout. Resort fee: This property's resort fee includes valet parking. Getting the resort fee waived through Globalist status also waives valet parking—otherwise paid stays typically don't get free parking. Communication was needed, though their text message system is quite convenient. They readily waived the resort fee. Breakfast: Also waived through Globalist status, but required communication. The property is in early ski season, which is why pricing isn't too bad—almost nothing is open. Only one café is operating at lunch. Food pricing is extremely high; we spent over $50 for cafe items. Dinner is currently in the conference hall, also very expensive. That said, ski access is convenient.

reviews.author: ElectricSheep
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP included: destination fee waived, lounge closed (COVID), replaced with double breakfast vouchers; $200 Amex prepay reimbursement for two nights, $100 THC credit for parking ($40/day) and hotel retail
reviews.content_original: 酒店位于harbor区，去市区little italy吃饭特别近，通过Amex白金预定prepay连住两晚可以获得$200报销，THC福利额外获得$100 credit，因为环球客已经有早饭了，可以用来停车($40/day) 和酒店内的商店购物。这家店套房很多，环球客容易升级，早餐在美国来说还行，起码是有人带位坐在餐厅里吃自助的那种，而且营业到11am可以当作早午餐，但是花钱就没必要了，因为账单显示$35一个人算上小费和税差不多两个人得$85-$90，只适合免费去吃。
reviews.content_en: Hotel is located in the harbor area, very close to Little Italy downtown for dining. Through Amex Platinum prepay booking for two consecutive nights, receive $200 reimbursement. THC benefits provide an additional $100 credit. Since Globalist status already includes breakfast, the credit can be used for parking ($40/day) and hotel retail shopping. This property has many suites; Globalist members upgrade easily. Breakfast is decent by American standards—at least it's seated buffet service with staff assistance, and operates until 11am so can serve as brunch. However, not worth paying for: the bill shows $35 per person, which with tip and tax comes to about $85-90 for two people. Only worth visiting if breakfast is complimentary.

reviews.author: kakatro
reviews.snp_stacking: Hyatt membership: no Night awards, but received points
reviews.content_original: 晚上9点check in，scenic view还没有ready还在打扫。所以给我们额外75刀food credit。加上100刀FHR的credit，我们去顶楼Rivea吃了个爽。早餐30刀credit可以在Della Kitchen吃，还挺不错的，最后早餐就自己付了10刀小费。checkout的时候175刀的credit没有apply正确，一番解释后，把零头也给我摸了，所以最后其实是178刀credit。因为credit感受还挺不错的，房间也比后面Park MGM的乞丐房好太多。
reviews.content_en: Checked in at 9 PM; the Scenic View suite wasn't ready yet and was being cleaned. They gave us an additional $75 food credit. Combined with the $100 FHR credit, we had a great experience at the top-floor Rivea restaurant. The $30 breakfast credit could be used at Della Kitchen, which was quite good; we only paid $10 tip for breakfast in the end. At checkout, the $175 credit didn't apply correctly, but after some explanation they waived the remainder too, so we ended up with $178 in credits. The credit experience was excellent and the room was much better than the basic room we got at Park MGM later.

reviews.author: xlin2100
reviews.content_original: 白金给早餐60 credit，+100 credit可以用在别的地方。订的是back to back的两天，用了两张卡，但都是under my name，但是前台说被分成了两个reservation，所以我拿到了每天160的credit，一共320，酒店的东西随便点。。。唯一要求就是第二天要下楼去前台reactivte房卡，to keep the same room。
reviews.content_en: Platinum provided $60 breakfast credit plus $100 credit for other uses. Booked back-to-back for two days using two cards, both under my name, but the front desk split it into two reservations. As a result, I received $160 in credits each day, totaling $320, and could order anything from the hotel. The only requirement was to go down to the front desk on the second day to reactivate the room key to keep the same room.

reviews.author: lala
reviews.content_original: 备注：

reviews.author: lala
reviews.content_original: 备注：

reviews.author: lala
reviews.content_original: 晚上9点多入住的，要了upgrade但只给到了7楼的corner suite。由于rivea没开，其他餐馆也都快关了，只能去了一家日餐混合American Korean的餐馆吃饭，餐馆名字叫KUMI。味道还不错，炒饭好评，寿司的肉不是很新鲜，但也能吃，反正也是白嫖。最后凑单了100刀，整体能吃，菜量也还可以。重点来了，住的那个corner suite的窗户下面能通风的value漏风，导致晚上睡觉一直很冷。早餐credit用在了della's kitchen，虽然是早餐但一直开到了下午2:30，中午去吃的，菜量还挺大的，一个20​的burrito上来占满了一整个盘子，巨大无比，但其实不怎么好吃。coconut creme waffle不错，比pancake好吃一点。最后下午check out的时候，等了快10分钟，因为前台没什么人而且其中一个前台业务还很不熟练，给另外俩大哥办入住，也是办了好一会。最后轮到我了办check-out，都没有apply到我的fhr 100刀的credit，而且不主动给我看folio想直接charge我卡，我让她把folio打印出来才发现的，反正业务很不熟练，服了。
reviews.content_en: Checked in after 9 PM. Requested an upgrade but only received a corner suite on the 7th floor. Since Rivea wasn't open and other restaurants were closing, we went to KUMI, a Japanese restaurant mixed with American and Korean cuisine. The food was decent—fried rice was good, the sushi meat wasn't very fresh but was edible and free anyway. Total came to $100. Overall satisfactory with decent portion sizes. The main issue: the corner suite's window had a ventilation leak beneath it, causing strong cold air during sleep. Used the breakfast credit at Della's Kitchen, which despite being a breakfast spot stays open until 2:30 PM. Went at lunch and the portions were large—a $20 burrito filled an entire plate, enormous but not particularly tasty. The coconut crème waffle was good, better than the pancake. At checkout, waited almost 10 minutes because there were few staff members and one was inexperienced, taking a long time to check in two other guests. When it was my turn to check out, my $100 FHR credit wasn't applied at all, and the staff didn't proactively show me the folio, wanting to directly charge my card. Only after I asked them to print the folio did I discover this. The staff was very inexperienced.

reviews.author: IcyJ
reviews.hotel_name_original: Loews Ventana Canyon Resort, Tucson AZ
reviews.content_original: Loews Ventana Canyon Resort, Tucson AZ. 入住时段：周六. 预定渠道：FHR. 预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房/Luxury King. 酒店会员：无. SNP/会员福利：$100 credit, $70 breakfast before 11AM. 给了升级。Luxury King装修过，房间很大，卫生间有双人tub。酒店较老但与环境和谐。地理位置极好，隔壁Sabino Canyon仅8分钟。$100 credit随便用，Flying V餐厅不错，100块够两个entree。早餐$70，Canyon Cafe自助$23，可以打包。
reviews.content_en: Loews Ventana Canyon Resort, Tucson AZ. Stay period: Saturday. Booking channel: FHR. Booked room/Actual room: Standard/Luxury King. Hotel membership: None. SNP/Member benefits: $100 dining credit, $70 breakfast credit (before 11 AM). Received room upgrade to Luxury King, recently renovated and spacious with double soaking tub. Hotel is older but harmonious with surroundings. Excellent location - Sabino Canyon is only 8 minutes away. $100 credit is flexible. Flying V restaurant is good quality, $100 covers two entrees. Breakfast includes $70 credit; Canyon Cafe buffet is $23, can take food to go.

reviews.author: xlin2100
reviews.hotel_name_original: Loews Ventana Canyon Resort, Tucson AZ
reviews.content_original: 没啥影响，你不说我都不知道。唯一不好的是没给升级。饭就一般吧，无功无过，附近好吃的也不少，离rocksville也就20分钟，酒店餐就点点酒水饮料小吃，很香。房间内里被ld吐槽了，阳台没有view，有点阴暗，但是我觉得住的挺香，fhr报销完，自付30块钱还要啥自行车。
reviews.content_en: Lobby renovation has no impact, wouldn't have noticed if not mentioned. Only downside was no room upgrade. Food is mediocre, nothing special. Plenty of good restaurants nearby, Rocksville is just 20 minutes away. Hotel dining is good for drinks and appetizers. Room was criticized by partner - balcony has no view and is somewhat dark. But I felt it was good value. After FHR reimbursement, out-of-pocket was only $30, can't ask for more.

reviews.author: kakaru
reviews.hotel_name_original: ritz carlton san francisco 旧金山丽思卡尔顿
reviews.snp_stacking: Earned one night SNP and two nights Platinum from double occupancy bookings, but no member benefits were honored
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：ritz carlton san francisco 旧金山丽思卡尔顿。入住时段：12月周六到周一。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：club level king size bed/无升级（给了个靠近角落的房子，但毫无景色）。酒店会员：小白金。SNP/会员福利：双人轮流订，给了一晚sn两晚的p，无任何会员福利。感觉这家根本看不上FHR的客户。只有最基本的FHR要求的福利能满足：比如4点退房，订房时说送$100餐饮credit给了（所以总共200）。因为是双人轮流订，第二天重新check in时前台居然想赖掉那200credit！FHR说的免费升房因为有行小字说视酒店情况决定，于是就没有了。而且最坑的是明明有能看街景的房却偏偏给了一个只能看见酒店院子，毫无景色的房。感觉就像是被降级了一样。
reviews.content_en: Ritz-Carlton San Francisco. Stay period: December Saturday to Monday. Booking channel: FHR Prepay. Booked room/Actual room: Club Level King Size/Club Level King Size (corner room with no view). Hotel membership: Marriott Silver Elite. SNP/Member benefits: Double occupancy bookings earned one night SNP and two nights Platinum status, but no member benefits were applied. Hotel doesn't value FHR customers. Only basic FHR-required benefits honored: 4pm checkout, $100 dining credit (total $200). Front desk tried to deny the $200 credit on second check-in due to alternating bookings. Complimentary upgrade promised in FHR terms has fine print about hotel discretion, so it was denied. Most frustrating: they assigned a room with only interior courtyard view when street-view rooms are available - feels like a downgrade. Club lounge was extremely crowded on Saturday.

reviews.author: TravelLove
reviews.snp_stacking: Stay 2 Get 1 promotion (counts as two Hyatt nights), $40 breakfast credit per person per day, $125 dining credit
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Seabird Resort Oceanside。入住时段：12/16-12/19。预定渠道：FHR。预定房型/实际入住房型：Partial Ocean View King → Ocean View King。酒店会员：无。SNP/会员福利：住二送一，算two Hyatt nights，每天每人$40的早餐额度，还有$125 dining credit。在LA和SD中间，离Carlsbad比较近，是一个很美但人不多的海滨城市。酒店半年前新开张，设施和服务都很棒，属于Destination by Hyatt。$125正好两个人和小娃吃一顿晚餐。坑爹的是有近$50 resort fee，停车也是valet only。
reviews.content_en: Seabird Resort Oceanside. Stay period: 12/16-12/19. Booking channel: FHR. Booked room/Actual room: Partial Ocean View King → Ocean View King. Hotel membership: None. SNP/Member benefits: Stay 2 Get 1 promotion (counts as two Hyatt nights), $40 breakfast credit per person per day, $125 dining credit. Located between LA and SD, close to Carlsbad - a beautiful but not crowded coastal city. Newly opened hotel (6 months old), excellent facilities and service, part of Destination by Hyatt. $125 was perfect for two adults and a small child for one dinner. Downside: nearly $50 resort fee and valet-only parking (or $5/day at public lot next to hotel, but need to repay at midnight).

reviews.author: kevinzhang99
reviews.content_original: 常规的FHR福利，提早checkin，4pm checkout，100刀credit可以餐厅吃饭，self park也可以用。30刀*2的早餐credit。这家目前在装修，前台换到了其他位置，很不起眼，以至于第一次进去都错过了。。可能也是装修的原因，餐厅非常地小，感觉是大堂一块区域临时划了一块给餐厅。可选的东西不多，鱿鱼圈11刀给一大盘是最大惊喜。房间中规中矩，不新也不旧，酒店地理位置还行，旁边就是Lenox可以shopping
reviews.content_en: Standard FHR benefits: early check-in, 4pm checkout, $100 credit for dining, self-parking available, and $30×2 breakfast credits. The hotel is currently undergoing renovation with the front desk relocated to an inconspicuous location—I missed it on my first visit. Due to the renovation, the restaurant is very small, feeling like a temporary setup in the main lobby. Limited menu options, but the $11 calamari platter was a pleasant surprise. The room is standard—neither new nor old. Good location with Lenox shopping mall nearby.

reviews.author: 没姐官配精灵
reviews.content_original: 常规的FHR福利，提早checkin，4pm checkout，100刀credit可以餐厅酒吧吃饭也可以room service，两个人60刀早餐(room service的话不包小费，可以餐厅前台grab to go但是要记得说要用fhr早餐福利，不然可能有bug)。Garden court巨火，需要提前订位，不然排队1小时起。。。Parking只有valet, 72一天，比较贵，unlimited in and out，所以最后oop 200左右。pied piper的汉堡和薯条都很好吃，推荐
reviews.content_en: Standard FHR benefits: early check-in, 4pm checkout, $100 credit for dining (restaurant, bar, or room service). Breakfast for two is $60 (room service excludes tip; can grab-to-go from restaurant counter but remember to mention FHR breakfast benefit or you may encounter a system issue). Garden Court is very popular—reserve ahead or expect 1+ hour wait. Valet-only parking at $72/day, expensive but unlimited in/out, totaling around $200. Pied Piper's burger and fries are excellent—highly recommended. Final rate after $200 Amex credit was just $313 after tax.

reviews.author: kruzer
reviews.booking_type: FHR Prepay (2 nights FHR + 1 night points)
reviews.actual_room_type: Deluxe Twin Room with Mountain View & Balcony
reviews.content_original: 去之前跟酒店问Suite被拒，但是可以换 twin with view & balcony。Check in的时候因为买用具花了太长时间并没有用到Noon Checkin。前台人特别好，因为是FHR和Points入住也挺麻烦的就顺便帮我把整个入住的parking和resort fee全都免了。FHR和Glob早餐credit $70，可以单点可以buffet ($35 per)。前两天单点根本吃不完70…还打包了一大堆。送的$100租了把筋膜枪+吃了晚饭。不过这家GH有点谐，我很多账单都没出现在我folio上。Checkout的时候本应该更贵的…但是几天后也没有追加charge。很神秘。总体来说推荐吧，跟楼上是两个体验了。虽然我走的时候缆车才开但是有shuttle可以忍。
reviews.content_en: I requested a suite upgrade before arrival but was declined. Instead, they offered a twin room with view and balcony, which was accepted. During check-in, shopping for supplies took so long I couldn't use the noon check-in benefit. The front desk staff were excellent—recognizing the complexity of the mixed FHR and points booking, they waived parking and resort fees entirely. Combined FHR and Globalist breakfast credit of $70 can be used for à la carte or buffet ($35 each). The first two days I couldn't finish the à la carte allowance and packed a lot away. The $100 credit covered a massage gun rental and dinner. Oddly, many charges didn't appear on my folio, and checkout cost less than expected—no additional charges appeared later. Very mysterious. Overall recommended, quite different from the review above. The gondola wasn't open when I left, but shuttle service made it manageable.

reviews.author: aprilyuyu
reviews.hotel_name_original: La Cantera Resort & Spa, San Antonio, TX
reviews.actual_room_type: Deluxe King with Balcony and Country view
reviews.content_original: 很多帖子post了大城市的FHR，Po个San Antonio 的吧，$100 credit 可以用于除了resort fee和房费以外所有消费，SPA和golf这次没机会体验，半山腰空气风景不错
reviews.content_en: Many posts cover major city FHR properties, so I'm sharing San Antonio. The $100 credit can be used for anything except resort fees and room rate. Didn't have time to try the spa or golf. Scenic location on a hillside with great air quality.

reviews.author: goosekey
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes - complimentary buffet breakfast (including tips) and $100 THC credit; destination fee waived after negotiation with management
reviews.content_original: 今天通过THC定了这家San Diego 的grand hyatt，填了凯悦会员号后直接出现在了hyatt的app里面，估计的确是能拿到SNP的。更新：确认可以拿到SNP，环球客提供免费自助早饺（包括小费），外加THC给的$100的credit。一开始前台说不能享受环球客福利免除destination fee，但和后台经理协商后同意免除destination fee. YMMV.
reviews.content_en: Booked through THC. After entering Hyatt member number, it appeared directly in the Hyatt app. Confirmed SNP received: complimentary buffet breakfast (including tips) and $100 THC credit. Front desk initially said could not waive destination fee, but after negotiating with management they agreed to waive it. YMMV.

reviews.author: kkzhou
reviews.snp_stacking: Given Hyatt member number, uncertain if SNP applied
reviews.content_original: 入住时段： 12.21-12.23。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：Premier King / High floor Fountain view。酒店会员：凯撒钻match来的MGM金。SNP/会员福利：给了Hyatt的会员号，不知道算不算。备注：用了三明治大法塞了20刀升级，自己和LD卡各订一晚，和前台大妈谈心，第二天去前台重新check-in，keep了原来的房间。FHR的Credit都能正确用上，虽然食物并不咋的。
reviews.content_en: Stayed 12/21-12/23. Booked FHR Prepay. Premier King upgraded to high floor fountain view. MGM Gold status from Caesar Diamond match. FHR credits used correctly, though food quality was mediocre. Used sandwich technique for upgrade, booked separately with partner's card, negotiated with front desk, kept room on second check-in.

reviews.author: jerryzzyy
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Ritz-Carlton Atlanta。入住时段：12/24。预定渠道：FHR。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐房/一级都没升。酒店会员：金。SNP/会员福利：无。备注：100 fhr credit，早饭80刀credit，四点退房，无welcome amenity。这栗子还不如万豪，除了备品和布草稍微好点…早饺居然要排队，room service电话也没人接，最后room service等了快一个半小时。
reviews.content_en: FHR stay on 12/24 with $100 FHR credit and $80 breakfast credit, 4pm checkout, no welcome amenity. Budget room with no upgrade. This Ritz doesn't compare to Marriott except for slightly better toiletries and linens. Breakfast required waiting in queue, room service unresponsive—waited nearly 1.5 hours for room service.

reviews.author: lalaohlala
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Encore。入住时段：圣诞前。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐king/ king with strip view。酒店会员：n/a。SNP/会员福利：n/a。备注：60 早餐credit，100 spa credit, 打电话和前台说不想去spa，给换成了food & beverage, but YMMV。用在了Jardin 和 in-room dining. Jardin 环境还可以, overpriced。
reviews.content_en: Budget king upgraded to king with strip view. $60 breakfast credit, $100 spa credit (changed to F&B upon request, YMMV). Used credits at Jardin and in-room dining. Jardin ambiance decent but overpriced.

reviews.author: lalaohlala
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Palazzo。入住时段：圣诞前。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐king/ king with strip view。酒店会员：n/a。SNP/会员福利：n/a。备注：65 早餐credit只能用在grand lux cafe，100 fhr credit for food. 这家店Amex FHR有专门的staff check in， 非常好说话。住了两晚，第二天P2去check in再check out的，也有相同的福利。吃了MOTT 32，感觉味道还行，没订到烤鸭。还去吃了matteo's 那家意面，不是特别好吃。他家的grand lux cafe的早餐分量真的大很实惠，65 用不完，味道也挺好的，10点以后要排队。
reviews.content_en: Budget king upgraded to king with strip view. $65 breakfast credit (Grand Lux Cafe only), $100 FHR food credit. Dedicated Amex FHR staff check-in, very accommodating. Stayed 2 nights with same benefits on second check-in. Grand Lux Cafe breakfast generous and good value (portions large, flavor good, crowds after 10am). Tried Mott 32 (decent) and Matteo's pasta (mediocre), didn't get peking duck reservations.

reviews.author: lalaohlala
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Bellagio。入住时段：圣诞前。预定渠道：FHR Prepay。预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐king/乞丐king with no view。酒店会员：mgm gold。SNP/会员福利：n/a。备注：60早餐credit，只有一家sadelle's 可以吃早饭，人超多，100 fhr credit for food，用在了noddles, 就是普通的粤菜（炒牛河里面放了芝麻酱不是很能接受）。最后吐槽一下bellagio, 人超级多，check in 的时候拿凯撒钻去mgm gold可以fast line。接待我的staff一脸便秘，没有升房。 房间是最小的，浴室没有浴缸而且没有门？？？浴室的龙头出水很小，很不舒服。三家住下来还是wynn的感觉最好，赌场人也不多。
reviews.content_en: Budget king with no view. $60 breakfast credit (Sadelle's only, very crowded), $100 FHR food credit used for noodles/Cantonese (stir-fried beef hor fun with sesame sauce—not appealing). Very crowded overall. MGM Gold fast check-in line available but staff unhelpful, no room upgrade. Smallest room with no bathtub, bathroom missing door, poor water pressure. Wynn was better overall with fewer crowds.

reviews.author: Max_CC
reviews.content_original: 酒店名称：Encore Boston Harbor。入住时段：圣诞前。预定渠道：FHR。预定房型/实际入住房型：Primier King升级成Harbor View。酒店会员：N/A。SNP/会员福利：N/A。备注：100 fhr credit，早饺80刀credit，四点退房，不过中午就走了，无welcome amenity。总体酒店体验还行，前台热情，免费停车，不检查疫苗不强制口罩，略担心传播。没去Casino凑热闹，外面温度较低，就呆在室内了，天气较阴，其实也没啥好看的view了。早饭一般，性价比低。需要强调的是 Red 8中餐馆饭菜质量太次了，价格昂贵，量少，美国中餐口味，似乎还有剩菜混炒，海鲜炒饭基本就是白米饭，比我们local中餐馆差多了。所以如果不是FHR的福利 不去赌场的话真没必要选这家。
reviews.content_en: $100 FHR credit, $80 breakfast credit, 4pm checkout (left at noon). Premier King upgraded to Harbor View, no welcome amenity. Overall decent experience—attentive front desk, free parking, no vaccine/mask requirements. Didn't visit casino due to cold weather outside. Breakfast mediocre and low value. Red 8 Chinese restaurant quality poor (overpriced, small portions, American-style Chinese, appears to reuse leftover food—seafood fried rice was mostly plain rice). Better value options exist unless using FHR benefits and visiting casino.

reviews.author: 金卡会员
reviews.content_original: 周末9点对面迪士尼有烟花，在阳台就能看。可惜LA罕见下雨，rooftop bar关了。
reviews.content_en: Weekend at 9pm, fireworks visible from the balcony across from Disneyland. Unfortunately it rained in LA which is rare, and the rooftop bar was closed.

reviews.author: someleo
reviews.hotel_name_original: Conrad at Las Vegas Resorts World
reviews.hotel_name_en: Conrad at Las Vegas Resorts World
reviews.snp_stacking: $50 food and beverage credit used at the Kitchen and Suns Up Buns Out; $125 credit available for any hotel facilities; $66 breakfast credit per room for participating restaurants; tips excluded
reviews.content_original: 125刀credit可以用在酒店内任何设施，每个房间还有66刀的早餐credit可以用在以上的餐馆，小费不能抵扣 因为check out队伍太长了就直接skip了结果收到了full statement，打了电话基本该免的都免掉了，还有15刀在小吃街买的奶茶没免就算了
reviews.content_en: $125 credit available for any hotel facilities; $66 breakfast credit per room usable at participating restaurants, tips excluded. Skipped checkout due to long line and received full statement, but resolved most charges by phone. Didn't get $15 in boba tea from the food court credited.

reviews.author: 谢志光
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 credit used at Blue Duck restaurant for $99 including tax - excellent value despite being slightly salty
reviews.content_original: 入住的时候有jr suite在卖，但FHR+水球还能一级不升，前台谈心无效，不想push too hard就算了，但还是感觉不太好，只能靠蓝鸭弥补一下
reviews.content_en: Junior suites were available for upgrade when checking in, but FHR + Hyatt Diamond didn't secure a room upgrade. Front desk negotiation unsuccessful; didn't want to push too hard. Disappointed but compensated somewhat with the Blue Duck restaurant credit.

reviews.author: 谢志光
reviews.snp_stacking: $125 credit usable for valet; excludes two restaurants, one of which doesn't accept walk-ins; credit could only be used for room service
reviews.content_original: 125刀可以用在valet，exclude两个餐厅，另一个不接受walk in，只能用在room service了
reviews.content_en: $125 credit usable for valet only, with two restaurants excluded - one doesn't accept walk-ins, so credit could only be applied to room service. Didn't get a proper meal. Poor experience.

reviews.author: siuu
reviews.hotel_name_original: THE US GRANT, a Luxury Collection Hotel, San Diego
reviews.hotel_name_en: The US Grant, a Luxury Collection Hotel, San Diego
reviews.content_original: $100 credit, $75 breakfast 为了用掉今年的FHR credit去的，房间没给升级，前台服务一般，房间中规中矩，酒店餐厅晚上不好吃早上还行（avocado toast不错且量不小）
reviews.content_en: $100 credit, $75 breakfast. Stayed mainly to use up annual FHR credit. No room upgrade provided. Front desk service was average. Standard room. Restaurant was mediocre in the evening but decent in the morning - the avocado toast was good and portions were generous.

reviews.author: ylxzzg
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP stacked, received $100 credit and breakfast
reviews.content_original: 新酒店，房间无升级。前台一问三不知，非常垃圾
reviews.content_en: New hotel with no room upgrade. Front desk staff unhelpful and clueless, very poor experience.

reviews.author: ZL10
reviews.content_original: FHR 给了 $100 credit, $60 breakfast。总体体验不错，前台服务不错，很爽快的就给了一个city view的升级。问了一下，$100可以用来买万豪gift card，直接多买了$200把另一个万豪的amex offer薅了。晚上去Davenport Lounge喝了两杯，用gift card付的，有JAZZ乐队表演，中间有人跳舞，大家都穿的很正式，就我穿了件短袖进去了。早餐只能去M Bistro。周末刚好是buffet，总体来说不错，包咖啡和茶，以及各种果汁，有当地特色法式甜甜圈beignet，还有单独的omelet station，可以自选配料。
reviews.content_en: FHR provided $100 credit and $60 breakfast. Overall excellent experience with good front desk service that promptly upgraded to city view. Learned that the $100 credit could be used to purchase Marriott gift cards, which I leveraged to get additional Amex offers. Visited Davenport Lounge for drinks in the evening with live jazz band and dancing (everyone dressed formally except me in a t-shirt). Breakfast at M Bistro was a weekend buffet with coffee, tea, juices, local specialty beignets, and an omelet station with customizable toppings.

reviews.author: ZL10
reviews.hotel_name_original: The Roosevelt New Orleans, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel
reviews.hotel_name_en: The Roosevelt New Orleans, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP stacked, received $100 FHR credit, $60 breakfast, and $50 dining credit from Diamond
reviews.content_original: FHR 给了$100 credit 和 $60 breakfast, Diamond另外给了 $50。酒店大堂的灯饰很华丽，但是地方不大，加上很多拍照的人，显得有点拥挤。前台非常冷漠，FHR加水钻也不给升级，直接说下一级房间订满了。出去逛得太晚回来，没来得及在酒店吃晚饭。于是第二天一早把$100 credit用在了买Hilton gift card。早餐去 Fountain Lounge吃的，依旧是buffet，吃的还可以，东西种类比Ritz要多一点，也有单独的omelet station，不过没有我爱吃的beignet。 免费喝的只有咖啡和茶，想着Diamond的$50 credit用不完，额外点了杯mimosa和果汁。还剩了二十多credit没用完，本着薅羊毛要薅干净的精神，吃完buffet去隔壁 Teddy's Cafe点了个spicy and sweet wings。 鸡翅竟然意外的好吃。不如之前不点酒，多点两份鸡翅带走。不过值得吐槽的是，这家华尔道夫服务确实不太行，房间也很旧。从房间电话只能接到concierge，晚上很早就下班了，想要个面巾纸都只能自己下楼跑前台去要。如果去新奥尔良住FHR在这两家选的话，我会推荐住Ritz
reviews.content_en: FHR provided $100 credit and $60 breakfast; Diamond gave an additional $50. The lobby had ornate lighting but was cramped with many tourists taking photos. Front desk was cold and unhelpful, refusing to upgrade even with FHR and elite status, claiming the next category was fully booked. Returned late from sightseeing and didn't have time for dinner, so the next morning used the $100 credit to buy Hilton gift cards. Breakfast at Fountain Lounge was a buffet with more variety than Ritz but no beignets. Only free coffee and tea; used some of the $50 Diamond credit for mimosa and juice. After buffet, went to nearby Teddy's Cafe with remaining credit and ordered spicy and sweet wings that were surprisingly good. Overall, the Waldorf service was poor and rooms were old. The room phone only connected to concierge who left early; I had to go downstairs to the front desk just to ask for tissues. For a New Orleans FHR choice between these two, I'd recommend the Ritz.

reviews.author: qgao8
reviews.content_original: 100刀credit点了room service晚饭，服务很好。送的早餐67刀花在了greenhouse的brunch上。早上10点就来check in按照要求给了tub房在次高层，不过这个位置也没啥风景。住到第二天下午三点才走。跟连锁的五星相比服务真的很好！推荐！
reviews.content_en: Used the $100 credit for room service dinner with excellent service. The $67 breakfast credit was used for brunch at Greenhouse. Check-in at 10am, received a bathtub room on a high floor as requested, though the view wasn't special. Stayed until 3pm the next day. Service was exceptional compared to major chain five-star hotels. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Oddinaaaaaa
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP stacked, received $100 FHR Amenity and $60 breakfast ($30 per person)
reviews.content_original: 整体住的还是很畅快的一次。因为和朋友出行就定了两间房，一间通过FHR一间是网站直接定的，定的时候好像还没match上gold；前台办理check in的时候一开始小哥还没主动给我办升级，问了之后立刻加上了给换到了这个顶楼的房间，而且是两间都加了。不知道是不是因为Gold。酒店的停车是$33/天，正好全部cover到。然后早餐credit在楼下的餐厅，非常便宜基本不喝酒很难吃到$60。令人意外的就是这次小费也包括在了餐费里面，所以整体来说除掉房费其他地方是没有出钱了。FHR会员拿纸信封写了邀请函还挺好笑的就是说。房间是City View可以直接看到先锋广场；就不发图了。风景还不错。一个miss就是大概是因为新年第一天，request的room services没有来。但是也就只住三天所以也就无所谓了。整体感觉性价比很高，很推荐！
reviews.content_en: Overall a very pleasant stay. Booked two rooms with a friend—one through FHR and one directly on their website (Gold status wasn't matched at booking). At check-in, the front desk agent initially didn't offer an upgrade, but after asking, immediately upgraded both rooms to the premium king on the top floor. Not sure if this was due to Gold status. Parking was $33/day and covered by the credits. Breakfast credit was very economical at the downstairs restaurant—hard to spend the full $60 without alcohol. Surprisingly, gratuity was included in the meal cost, so aside from the room rate, there were no additional expenses. The FHR concierge sent an amusing invitation letter in a paper envelope. The room had a city view overlooking Pioneer Square with decent scenery. One miss: room service didn't arrive, likely due to New Year's Day, but with only a three-day stay it wasn't a big deal. Overall excellent value and highly recommended!

reviews.author: hydralisk
reviews.hotel_name_original: Mansion On Forsyth Park, Kessler Collection， Savannah GA
reviews.content_original: 酒店属于Kessler Collection, 一个小众的酒店品牌，好像是走的南方庄园土豪奢华风。酒店在萨凡纳最大的公园（福赛斯公园）边上，离萨凡纳核心商业区略远，走路要15-20分钟。酒店里各种画和收藏品，酒店的餐厅是个真古建，非常值得一去。运通给的$100 credit 可以直接用在酒店的resort fee和用餐。
reviews.content_en: Part of Kessler Collection, a niche hotel brand with Southern mansion luxury aesthetic. Located beside Savannah's largest park (Forsyth Park), slightly removed from the commercial core (15-20 min walk). Hotel features various paintings and collectibles. Restaurant is in an authentic historic building, worth visiting. The $100 Amex credit can be used for resort fees and dining.

reviews.author: kkymc
reviews.hotel_name_original: The St. Anthony, a Luxury Collection Hotel, San Antonio
reviews.hotel_name_en: The St. Anthony, a Luxury Collection Hotel
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes - SNP benefits applied even with prepaid booking
reviews.content_original: prepaid 也有SNP
reviews.content_en: SNP benefits apply even with FHR prepaid bookings.

reviews.author: koto1108
reviews.hotel_name_original: The Nines, a Luxury Collection Hotel, Portland
reviews.hotel_name_en: The Nines, a Luxury Collection Hotel
reviews.actual_room_type: Upgraded one level, 9th floor King room
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes - $125 credit (in-room dining, restaurant, bar, beverages only, not valet parking) + $60 breakfast
reviews.content_original: 整体来说不太爽的体验，领导表示非常disappointed，但没办法，downtown另外一家Duniway订不到，还有一家IHG的离太远，只能将就。好处：地理位置Portland downtown，离苹果店和各大商店很近步行距离。给的credit能cover餐饮的固定20%小费。坏处：只有valet parking$52，还不能用credit，果断停两个路口外的24/7 Smart Park停车场，10刀一天。饮食很一般，房间设计很一般，完全没有5星luxury的感觉，我觉得4星low-end领导觉得就3星high-end，只有健身房没泳池。第二天早上有一大队运动员入住，整层楼都是大麻烟味，恶心得要死。
reviews.content_en: Overall unsatisfactory experience, host expressed disappointment. Downtown Duniway unavailable, other IHG property too far away. Pros: Downtown Portland location, walking distance to Apple Store and shops, credit covers standard 20% dining gratuity. Cons: Only valet parking available at $52 (credit doesn't apply), opted for Smart Park 24/7 lot two blocks away at $10/day. Food mediocre, room design uninspired, lacks 5-star luxury feel—feels like 4-star low-end or 3-star high-end, has gym but no pool. Large group of athletes checked in next day, entire floor reeked of marijuana, disgusting. Would not stay without $200 credit reimbursement.

reviews.author: wsgcjdtc
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 credit (spa converted to dining credit), $60 breakfast, $25 welcome drink
reviews.content_original: 前台请示完manager把spa credit给换成了dining credit，不过前台说现在spa已经开放了，下次就不给换了。晚上在Wynn楼下的bar把welcome drink用完了，多点的酒钱也用dining credit报掉了。第二天的早餐提前预订了Encore楼下的Jardin，味道很棒。剩下的dining credit在楼下的cafe买了一些take out的面包，为后面的国家公园旅行准备了早餐。
reviews.content_en: Front desk arranged with manager to convert spa credit to dining credit (spa may be reopened, conversion unavailable next time). Completed welcome drink at Wynn lobby bar, additional drinks covered by dining credit. Pre-booked breakfast at Jardin in Encore tower—excellent taste. Used remaining dining credit at lobby cafe for takeout bread for national park trip breakfast.

reviews.author: wsgcjdtc
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 dining credit (usable at all MGM properties), $60 breakfast
reviews.content_original: Check-in的时候用金卡走了vip通道，但是前台只给升到了Bellagio主楼南边的那个楼里的strip view房间，说是fountain view没有了。$100 dining credit原计划是用在buffet的平安夜晚餐，但是入住后被告知buffet晚上不开，于是采用了plan B，去了提前预约的Aria的泰餐Lemongrass，发现味道很不错，两个人$100可以吃的很爽，值得打卡。第二天早餐提前约了Saddles, 他们自己广告说是LAS最好吃的brunch，味道确实很赞，记得提前预约，否则walk in需要等太久了。
reviews.content_en: Used gold card for VIP check-in, upgraded to Strip View King in south wing of main tower (fountain view unavailable). Dining credit originally planned for Christmas Eve buffet, but buffet closed evenings—pivoted to pre-booked Lemongrass Thai at Aria with excellent taste, two people enjoyed $100 credit fully. Pre-booked breakfast at Saddles, reputed as best brunch in Las Vegas with genuinely excellent taste—strongly recommend pre-booking to avoid long walk-in waits.

reviews.author: Jeffrey
reviews.content_original: 早餐Buffet因为疫情关了， 所以只能点inroom breakfast，吃的还行。$100的property credit可以去楼下餐厅吃。
reviews.content_en: Breakfast buffet closed due to pandemic, in-room breakfast ordered instead, quality acceptable. $100 property credit usable at downstairs restaurants.

reviews.author: MarriottBonvoy
reviews.hotel_name_original: Hotel Maria Cristina, A Luxury Collection Hotel, Donostia - San Sebastian, Spain
reviews.hotel_name_en: Hotel Maria Cristina, A Luxury Collection Hotel
reviews.content_original: 就这？一言以蔽之就是tries too hard to be like a Marriott-branded hotel，非常标准化，就像是住了个美国随便什么丽思/瑞吉一样，没劲。很可惜，明明是圣塞巴斯蒂安最有名的百年五星酒店，本来期望能感受到一种底蕴，一种独特的文化和风味，结果完全没有。软硬件都没得说，看得出来所有员工都对自己的工作很自豪，房间维护得非常好，像是新的一样。但是有一个低级错误是预约了餐厅用餐，结果前一天晚上说餐厅在预约的时间不开门，只得叫room service, 结果果然很糟糕，点了一个鱼下死手放盐，而且是用装航空餐的那种铁箱子运过来的。早餐也没有什么亮点。最大的问题还是tries too hard to be like a Marriott-branded hotel，完全是美国random五星酒店的体验，为什么要这样做，书桌抽屉里没纸没笔，就一本摩门经，离大谱。总之算不上快逃，但也毫无订的必要。
reviews.content_en: Really? In short, it tries too hard to be like a Marriott-branded hotel—very standardized, like staying at just any random Ritz or Regis in America, boring. It's a shame because Hotel Maria Cristina is the most famous century-old five-star hotel in San Sebastian. I expected to feel its heritage, a unique culture and flavor, but found none. The hardware and software are decent—clearly all staff take pride in their work and rooms are impeccably maintained, like new. But there was a major oversight: I had a restaurant reservation, only to be told the night before that the restaurant was closed at the reserved time. We had to order room service instead, which was terrible—the fish was oversalted and arrived in an airplane meal aluminum container. Breakfast was unremarkable. The biggest problem remains that it tries too hard to be a Marriott-branded hotel—it's just a random American five-star experience. Why do this? The desk drawers have no paper or pen, just a Book of Mormon. Completely off. Not an escape-immediately situation, but absolutely no reason to book.

reviews.author: MarriottBonvoy
reviews.content_original: 给去圣塞巴斯蒂安的各位坛友推荐一个酒店，叫Lasala Plaza Hotel, 本来只是想花掉CSP的UR portal报销（算是四星酒店吧），没想到非常惊喜，也直接导致了第二天的FHR就这。酒店离老城所有好酒馆走路3-5分钟，离海边那堆touristy的景点两分钟，但闹中取静，在一条小巷子里，非常安静。订的historic corner room, 实际户型有点像junior suite了，UR portal报销后只需$180, 反观Maria Cristina当天乞丐房$400。酒店团队很年轻但服务很专业，有求必应。卫生间配备卫洗丽。总而言之快来Lasala Plaza Hotel! 家人们离得多远都要来！求求了！
reviews.content_en: I recommend a hotel to friends visiting San Sebastian called Lasala Plaza Hotel. I originally just wanted to use my CSP UR portal to cover it (considered a four-star hotel), but it was a wonderful surprise—it directly led to booking FHR for the next day. The hotel is a 3-5 minute walk from all the good taverns in the old city, a 2-minute walk to touristy beach attractions, yet quiet and hidden in a small alley. I booked a historic corner room which turned out to be more like a junior suite. After UR portal reimbursement it was only $180, compared to Maria Cristina's $400 for a budget room that same day. The hotel team is young but very professional, accommodating any request. The bathroom has a bidet toilet seat. In short, come to Lasala Plaza Hotel! No matter how far you are, you must come! Please!

reviews.author: easyandme
reviews.content_original: Estepona 是安达卢西亚南部最喜欢的小镇之一，安静风景好街道也有特色。此次环西班牙自驾之旅（2019年）停留过的小镇基本是以住国营的 Parador 偏多，但经过太阳海岸的时候还是入住了这家位于 Estepona 的度假酒店。预定的是标准乞丐房，入住当天客房较满，前台升了一级但还是普通的标房。酒店应该有一些年头了，房间的设施干净但建筑整体看上去偏老旧，阳台海景不错，大理石浴缸空间较大。酒店粉红的外墙颜色别去住什么 Royal Hawaiian 啦，去南欧住原汁原味的粉墙度假酒店。酒店泳池的数量不少，户外的几个泳池很大可惜没有加热。通往海滩的花园步道很适合散步，特别悠闲。晚餐中规中矩，主食是 Grilled Sirloin 和 Grilled Seabass。晚餐的亮点是可以近距离观赏地道的安达卢西亚 Flamenco 表演。早餐的 buffet 非常棒，种类繁多且环境极佳，食物和饮品本身的口味在水准之上。Estepona是从 Málaga 前往 Seville 很好的落脚点，如果自驾到附近并打算停留的话，还是非常推荐这家酒店的。
reviews.content_en: Estepona is one of my favorite small towns in southern Andalusia—quiet, with beautiful scenery and charming streets. On my 2019 Spanish road trip, most stays were at state-run Paradores, but when passing through the Costa del Sol I stayed at this resort hotel in Estepona. I booked a standard budget room; on arrival it was full so the front desk upgraded one level, but it was still a standard room. The hotel has some age to it—clean facilities but the building overall looks rather dated. Balcony sea views were nice and the marble bathtub has good space. The pink exterior color—forget Royal Hawaiian, just stay at an authentic pink-walled Mediterranean resort. The hotel has many pools; the outdoor pools are large but unfortunately unheated. The garden path to the beach is perfect for leisurely strolls. Dinner was decent—grilled sirloin and grilled seabass. The highlight was watching authentic Andalusian Flamenco up close. The breakfast buffet was excellent with diverse options in a great setting, with flavors above standard. Estepona is a good stopover from Málaga to Seville, and I highly recommend this hotel if you're driving through and planning to stay.

reviews.author: intermilan
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 dining credit + dual Universal Express Unlimited
reviews.content_original: 贡献个论坛里没见过的。这次来奥兰多体验了四季之外的所有fhr酒店。总体来说这家最值。准备具体开个帖子说
reviews.content_en: Contributing something not yet seen on the forum. This time in Orlando I experienced all FHR hotels except Four Seasons. Overall this one provided the best value. Planning to write a detailed post about it.

reviews.author: K-L837
reviews.content_original:
这周末刚刚住的:

酒店名称：Hyatt Regency Lake Tahoe Resort
入住时段：周末
预定渠道：FHR PREPAY
预定房型/实际入住房型：King Bed 乞丐房/ 2 Double （check in的时候被告知可以升到King Bed w/ balcony，但是要等。因为堵了一早上车LD决定要有现房的2 Double）
酒店会员：白板
SNP/会员福利：100刀dining credit，双人早餐，noon check in，4pm check out （被告因为在周日checkout，4:30-5:00问题也不大。如果在附近滑雪的话，一般雪场4点关lift，所以挺实用的）。

酒店设施一般，房门极不隔音。餐厅选择不多，唯一好一点的lone eagle grill（在酒店对面）因为没提前定，没位子。酒店里面的餐厅可点菜品单一。

晚上10点更新，千万别要有connecting door的房间，极度不隔音。隔壁说话声音稍微大一点就听的一清二楚，电视也。酒店有9pm开始的quiet hour，打电话会让保安上楼劝说。
reviews.content_en:
Just stayed this weekend:

Hotel: Hyatt Regency Lake Tahoe Resort
Stay period: weekend
Booking method: FHR Prepay
Booked/actual room type: King Bed (basic room) / 2 Double (was offered upgrade to King Bed with balcony but had to wait; after sitting in traffic all morning, partner decided to take the 2 Double that was ready)
Hotel membership: none
Benefits: $100 dining credit, breakfast for two, noon check-in, 4pm check-out (was told since checking out Sunday, 4:30-5pm no problem. If skiing nearby, most mountains close lifts at 4pm, so this is quite useful).

Hotel facilities are average, soundproofing on room doors is terrible. Limited restaurant options; the best one, Lone Eagle Grill (across from hotel), was fully booked since we didn't reserve. Limited menu options at hotel restaurants.

Update at 10pm: absolutely avoid rooms with connecting doors—extremely poor soundproofing. Neighbors' conversations carry through clearly, as does TV noise. Hotel has quiet hours starting at 9pm; if you're loud they'll send security up to ask you to keep it down.

reviews.author: TrashPanda
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Loews Regency New York
入住时段：2021-2022跨年 12/31/2021 - 1/3/2022
预定渠道：FHR Prepaid
预定房型/实际入住房型：Premium King床房 / Studio King床房
酒店会员：Loews YouFirst Loyalty program 白板 貌似沒加上
SNP/会员福利：$100 FHR Amenity + $70 早餐（實際上好像吃超過了幾餐也沒加錢？）

备注：感覺還不錯。Last minute又是扭腰跨年，FHR有個住二送一所以三晚一共花了大約$1.7k含稅含小費。早上10點到了說房間已經准備好了，或者等下給個Studio。出去吃頓飯回來12點正好入住。房間在曼哈頓算是傻大的。有浴缸有淋浴有沙發有座椅，玄關還有微波爐和第二個小冰箱。酒店有點年頭了但是看起來還挺有歲月的韻味。免費早餐不錯吃。晚餐$100那餐麻麻地。目測所有Loews酒店都一樣FHR的待遇？
reviews.content_en:
Hotel: Loews Regency New York
Stay period: New Year's Eve 2021-2022 (12/31/2021 - 1/3/2022)
Booking method: FHR Prepaid
Booked/actual room type: Premium King / Studio King
Hotel membership: Loews YouFirst Loyalty program (white card, doesn't seem to be registered)
Benefits: $100 FHR Amenity + $70 breakfast (actually seems like we ate more than a few meals and didn't get charged extra?)

Remarks: Felt pretty good. Last-minute New Year's stay in NYC; FHR had a "stay 2 nights get 1 free" promotion so 3 nights total cost about $1.7k including tax and tips. Arrived at 10am and they said room was ready or we could wait for a Studio. Went out for lunch, came back at noon for check-in. Room is huge for Manhattan. Has bathtub, shower, sofa, chairs, microwave and second mini fridge in entryway. Hotel is a bit old but has interesting character. Free breakfast was good. The $100 dinner credit meal was mediocre. Seems like all Loews hotels offer the same FHR treatment?

reviews.author: brokenarcher
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes—Aspire Diamond benefits included $50 daily credit (all restaurants), plus $66 daily breakfast from FHR; benefits were flexible and generous with overages waived
reviews.content_original:
酒店：Vegas Conrad
入住日期：12/24-26
预定渠道：FHR
预定房型/入住房型：乞丐/strip view King suite (58楼)
酒店会员：aspire水钻
福利：刚开的时候也来过一次，不过不是FHR订的，总结就是他家credit给得很大方很随性，用超一点到最后都会waive掉，而且各种credit虽然有restriction，到最后还是都能人工override，所以放心大胆用。

$125 property credit除了不能买买买以外都能用，我们用在了云华宫Genting Palace，价格虚高但感觉菜品还行...每天水钻送$50可以用在任何餐厅...每天FHR送$66早餐，只能用在the kitchen，可以单点也可以自助...整个stay一共挂了云华宫、小吃街、老虎堂奶茶、kitchen早饭。最后folio除了小费全都免了
reviews.content_en:
Hotel: Vegas Conrad
Stay dates: 12/24-26
Booking method: FHR
Booked/actual room type: basic room / strip view King suite (58th floor)
Hotel membership: Aspire Diamond
Benefits: I stayed here before when it first opened, though not booked through FHR. In summary, this hotel is very generous and casual with credits—if you go over they waive it, and while various credits have restrictions, they'll manually override everything at the end, so use them freely.

$125 property credit works for everything except shopping. We used it at Genting Palace—overpriced but decent food...Aspire gives $50 daily for any restaurant...FHR gives $66 daily breakfast, only at The Kitchen, can order à la carte or buffet...Overall stay charged Genting Palace, food court, tiger sugar boba, kitchen breakfast. Final folio waived everything except tip.

reviews.author: jzthinkgeek
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 USD credit for restaurant/parking/SPA; $30 USD credit per person for breakfast
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：JW Marriott Parq Vancouver
入住时段：01/2022 工作日
预定渠道：FHR Prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：预定King，实际King - water view
酒店会员：Marriott Gold
SNP/会员福利：$100 USD Credit 可用于饭店、停车、SPA; 每人 $30 USD Credit 早饭 (都会按照实际汇率折算成加币）
备注： $100 Credit 能用于停车很棒，SPA可以买护肤品之类的用完额度；Marriott 正常累计房晚和积分
reviews.content_en: JW Marriott Parq Vancouver. Stayed January 2022 on a weekday. Booked King room, received King with water view. Marriott Gold member. SNP benefits: $100 USD credit for restaurant, parking, or SPA; $30 USD credit per person for breakfast (all converted to CAD at exchange rate). The $100 credit for parking was excellent, and SPA credits can be used on skincare products. Earned normal Marriott points and night credits.

reviews.author: NuHuo
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 MGM dining credit; $30-33 per person breakfast (max 2 people)
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Bellagio
入住时段：2022 1月末
预定渠道：FHR
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐 / Fountain view
酒店会员：MGM GOLD
SNP/会员福利：100$ MGM吃饭，每天33/人还是30/人 （最多两个人）吃早饭
备注：三明治大法20刀 很容易的拿到喷泉房， MGM GOLD可以免费停车
reviews.content_en: Bellagio. Stayed late January 2022. Booked basic room, received fountain view. MGM GOLD member. SNP benefits: $100 MGM dining credit; $30-33 per person breakfast (max 2 people). Sandwich hack for $20 easily gets fountain view. MGM GOLD gets free parking.

reviews.author: NuHuo
reviews.snp_stacking: $125 dining credit; $33 x 2 breakfast (only at The Kitchen); upgraded to suite but with poor view (5th floor overlooking parking garage)
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Crockfords LXR Las Vegas
入住时段：2022 1月末
预定渠道：FHR
预定房型/实际入住房型：Strip view king / King suite
酒店会员： GOLD
SNP/会员福利：125$ 吃饭， 33x2 早餐（只能在The Kitchen）, 升了套房，但是没有景色，5楼看着停车楼。
备注：125$可以在小吃街吃到撑。。。停车楼好远。。。GPS不好找入口，绕了一大圈。。。
服务特别好，前台把一切都说的很清楚，然后Lobby就我一个客人，隔壁Conrad可能有三十个在排队
reviews.content_en: Crockfords LXR Las Vegas. Stayed late January 2022. Booked Strip view King, received King suite. GOLD member. SNP benefits: $125 dining credit; $33 x 2 breakfast (only at The Kitchen); upgraded to suite but with poor view on 5th floor overlooking parking garage. Excellent front desk service. Lobby nearly empty while neighboring Conrad had 30 people in line.

reviews.author: MostlyHarmless
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP available. $100 credit usable only at lobby bar (hotel's only restaurant). Titanium member beverage voucher.
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：The Ritz-Carlton, Cleveland
入住时段：2022年2月某周末
预定渠道：FHR Prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐/乞丐
酒店会员：Marriott Titanium
SNP/会员福利：SNP有。整家酒店只有大堂吧一个餐厅（是的，你没看错，这还是个栗子），所以100刀credit也仅有这一个地方能用。吃了顿晚餐又咸又腻味道不太行。早餐也是一个地方，依然难吃。另外钛金会员送一张酒水兑换券（没错，还是在同一个大堂吧）。
备注：这家栗子开在一个老旧的商场里，停车场破到像年久失修废弃多年。酒店在商场三楼，跟商场整体比起来稍微还新一点。
毫无升级。
刚进房间发现卫生间里有已经拆封的棉签，有条浴巾也看起来脏脏的有明显的污点，咖啡机的胶囊也有好几颗没有补，看来打扫很不走心。无夜床。备品是Asprey, Diptyque, Gilchrist & Soames混搭，晚上又要了点，送来的又是另外两个不同的牌子。
提前在app上选了，CI的时候前台也跟我确认了late checkout，结果退房当天中午刚过12点就来敲门催退房，还称系统里没说我要late checkout。最后账单里多算了valet（并没有用），早餐credit也忘扣了，又扯了很久才弄好。
再次证明了美帝的栗子普遍不咋样，快逃
reviews.content_en: The Ritz-Carlton, Cleveland. Stayed one weekend in February 2022. Booked basic room, received basic room. Marriott Titanium member. SNP benefits: $100 credit usable only at the lobby bar (hotel's only restaurant). Dinner was salty and unappetizing. Breakfast equally poor. Titanium member received beverage voucher at same bar. No room upgrade. Hotel in old mall on 3rd floor with deteriorated parking lot. Poor cleanliness: opened cotton swabs in bathroom, dirty towel with visible stains, empty coffee capsules. No turndown service. Toiletries were mixed brands. Selected late checkout via app and confirmed at check-in, but was knocked on at 12:30pm to check out. Bill incorrectly charged valet (not used) and forgot breakfast credit. US Ritz-Carlton properties generally disappointing.

reviews.author: Rongye
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP stacking applied; Platinum welcome amenity extended to 3rd person breakfast
reviews.content_original: 瑞吉服务真没得说，就是好，入住的时候已经准备好了印有我姓名的欢迎信封和房卡，房间里也摆了几个水果当欢迎礼（在美国第一次见到欢迎礼啊感动）。比较遗憾的是酒店没有自助早餐选项，FHR和白金的免费早餐变成了每人30刀额度，这么点钱其实是吃不饱的，但看在给我升了Astor套房的份上就不计较啦，房间里的浴缸超大超级爽！一开始我还怕FHR升astor套不保险还叠加了套房券，结果酒店提前五天就发邮件来确认了FHR已经给我升级到了astor，省了一张套房券。休瑞整体硬件确实有点旧了，但是优质服务带来的体验完全可以cover硬件的不足，推荐！
reviews.content_en: St. Regis service is exceptional. Upon arrival, personalized welcome envelopes with my name and room key were prepared, and the room had welcome fruit gifts (first time seeing welcome amenities in the US, very touching). The only downside is the lack of complimentary breakfast—FHR and Platinum benefits converted to $30 per person credit, which isn't much, but given the upgrade to an Astor suite I won't complain. The bathtub is huge and wonderful! I initially worried about the suite upgrade reliability, so I stacked a suite certificate, but the hotel confirmed FHR upgrade to Astor five days in advance, saving me the certificate. The property hardware is somewhat dated, but excellent service completely compensates. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: MarriottBonvoy
reviews.snp_stacking: Marriott Platinum benefits: $100 food credit + $30 per person breakfast
reviews.content_original: FHR/LHRC酒店超级数据点贴 酒店常旅客 酒店名称：Houston st Regis 入住时段：2021 感恩节 预定渠道：FHR 预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐双床房，看不出有什么升级 酒店会员：万豪小白金 SNP/会员福利：100$ food credit + 30 per person breakfast 备注：十层景观全无，credit也不能用在停车，房间也看不出有任何升级。总的感觉酒店不够厚道
reviews.content_en: YMMV data point: No visible room upgrade from budget double room. 10th floor with no view. Food credit cannot be used for parking. No observable room upgrade. Overall impression: hotel was not generous.

reviews.author: TrashPanda
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 FHR amenity (dinner), double breakfast, noon check-in
reviews.content_original: 感覺還不錯的一家酒店。推薦東岸不想折騰的的大朋友們。淡季一晚也才三百多。
reviews.content_en: Nice hotel overall. Recommended for friends on the East Coast who don't want to deal with complications. Off-season rates around $300+ per night.

reviews.author: Chris123
reviews.content_original: 这家酒店是我看有25%off 折下来 267usd比较划算才定的 实际入住下来非常满意 交通非常方便 周围景点都可以步行 地铁三条线就在楼下 机场大巴站走路5分钟 屋顶酒吧看圣家堂位置绝佳 硬件也是一流 服务很热情 有求必应 去巴萨旅游或看球的兄弟们可以试一下
reviews.content_en: Booked this hotel after seeing the 25% discount brought the rate to $267—excellent value. Very satisfied with the stay. Convenient location, all nearby attractions walkable, three metro lines downstairs, airport bus stop 5 minutes walk away. Rooftop bar with perfect views of Sagrada Familia. First-class facilities and enthusiastic, accommodating service. Recommended for those visiting Barcelona for tourism or football matches.

reviews.author: RiceLord
reviews.content_original: 早餐是自助，注意room service自动22%小费（本来想法是room service少给点小费 结果）水门事件的房间在二楼，checkin时候问已经有人住了，估计很抢手
reviews.content_en: Breakfast is buffet-style. Note that room service automatically adds 22% gratuity. The Watergate scandal room is on the second floor - when we checked in, it was already occupied, probably in high demand.

reviews.author: ethanycx
reviews.snp_stacking: $60 breakfast credit, $100 property credit, room upgrade, late checkout, champagne and chocolate
reviews.content_original: $42的valet parking和$120的brunch全都报销了；$100刀可以用在除了房费以外任何room charge（甚至可以买酒店的浴袍）；早餐credit可以用在in room service。酒店餐厅很好吃，downtown范围内 (< 3 miles) 有免费的house car接送。感觉一般比较小众/独立的FHR礼遇会比连锁好一些。
reviews.content_en: $42 valet parking and $120 brunch were fully reimbursed. $100 credit can be used on any room charges except the room rate (even to purchase hotel robes). Breakfast credit can be used for in-room service. The hotel restaurant is excellent, and there's complimentary house car service within downtown (< 3 miles). It seems smaller, independent FHR properties tend to offer better perks than chain hotels.

reviews.author: hydralisk
reviews.hotel_name_original: Loews Ventana Canyon Resort, Tucson, AZ
reviews.content_original: 房费300+， 前台的小姐姐特别热情，直接升级了套间（其实就是两个房间合并起来的），100 dining credit + 70 breakfast credit。减掉FHR的200刀简直就是白住。前台还准备了欢迎的果汁和手工巧克力。这个度假村在tucson东边的山下 （ventana canyon），度假村内部有个小的trail，里面有个小瀑布。度假村的外面是一个难度比较大的hiking trail，很多人爬山，上山下山大概7miles，来回3-4小时，非常值得一爬。
reviews.content_en: Room rate $300+. The front desk staff were very warm and directly upgraded us to a suite (which is actually two rooms combined). $100 dining credit + $70 breakfast credit. After the $200 FHR credit, it was essentially free. The front desk also prepared welcome juice and handmade chocolate. The resort is located in the foothills east of Tucson (Ventana Canyon). Inside the resort there's a small trail with a waterfall. Outside the resort is a challenging hiking trail that many people climb - about 7 miles round trip, 3-4 hours total, highly recommended.

reviews.author: herebjldn
reviews.content_original: 多次入住，每一次都感叹酒店服务实在太好了。酒店开业已有较长时间，装修风格不够现代在所难免，但所有设施都维护地很好。从进入酒店大堂开始，到办理完入住坐电梯去房间，全程都有不同岗位的员工衔接陪同，遇到的每一位员工都能及时提供周到的服务，表现出极高的服务水准。早餐丰盛美味，中餐厅价格适中。目前是个人最喜欢的深圳的酒店，强烈推荐。
reviews.content_en: Multiple stays, and each time I'm amazed at how excellent the hotel service is. The hotel has been open for a while, so it's natural the decor isn't the most modern, but all facilities are very well maintained. From entering the lobby to checking in and taking the elevator to the room, staff from different departments accompanied us throughout, and every staff member provided timely and thoughtful service with high standards. Breakfast is abundant and delicious, and the Chinese restaurant prices are reasonable. Currently my favorite hotel in Shenzhen, strongly recommend.

reviews.author: wen666
reviews.snp_stacking: Globalist benefits stacked with FHR: $100 dining credit, complimentary breakfast, 4pm checkout
reviews.content_original: 跟队友两张白金各订一晚，前台给合并升级成最贵房型，一晚$2000+，无需换房间
reviews.content_en: Booked with teammate using two Amex Platinum cards for one night each. Front desk merged bookings and upgraded to the most expensive room type for over $2000 per night without requiring a room change.

reviews.author: brokenarcher
reviews.content_original: 酒店有点年数了，就算升套房间还是比较小，一个小窗看出去啥都没有，咖啡机不是nespresso就算了竟然还是全手动的keurig有点掉价。酒店餐厅shuckers听名字就是吃生蚝的地方，因为疫情只有周末开（好奇如果平时来住这$100怎么用，必须点room service么）。餐厅装修有点年数了，而且很昏暗，不是我的菜。我和P2因为之后想去pike胡吃海喝所以就点了些shareable（主要是海鲜）和clam chowder，食物还可以，nothing to write home about，价格嘛肯定是偏贵，不解的是大多食客都是外来的，难道是来碰头下榻的朋友？早餐在lobby，中规中矩没啥亮点。总体来说这家酒店不是我的菜，年数摆在那里就算装修也无法改变格局，历史意义大于入住体验。
reviews.content_en: The hotel is a bit dated. Even with the suite upgrade, the room is still relatively small with a small window overlooking nothing. The coffee machine isn't Nespresso—it's a fully manual Keurig, which is underwhelming. The hotel restaurant, Shuckers (oyster-themed), only opened weekends due to COVID. I was curious how to use the $100 credit if visiting on weekdays—do you have to order room service? The restaurant is dated and dimly lit, not my style. My partner and I ordered shareables (mostly seafood) and clam chowder since we planned to go to Pike Place later. The food was decent, nothing to write home about. Prices are definitely expensive. It's puzzling that most diners seemed to be guests at the hotel—were they coordinating a gathering? Breakfast was in the lobby, standard without highlights. Overall, this hotel isn't for me. Given its age, renovation can't change the layout; its historical significance outweighs the guest experience.

reviews.author: ZzzLi
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 FHR onsite credit (dining + parking), $30 per person per day breakfast credit
reviews.content_original: 酒店2018年新建的，很新，服务也非常不错。春假期间人很多，没给升级房型。
reviews.content_en: The hotel was built in 2018, brand new, with excellent service. Very busy during spring break, no room upgrade provided.

reviews.author: ZzzLi
reviews.hotel_name_original: Foundry Hotel, Curio Collection by Hilton, Asheville NC
reviews.hotel_name_en: Foundry Hotel, Curio Collection by Hilton
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 FHR onsite credit (food only); Hilton Diamond $15 per person per day food credit; Hilton SNP not applied
reviews.content_original: 赶在THC搞活动，25%off 预订的，酒店是废弃工厂改造的，很新也比较有特色。房间很大服务不错，另外神奇的是入住两晚，第二天的早饭$60、parking$28、吧台买的饮料$10都没算到账单里。
reviews.content_en: Booked during THC promotion at 25% off. The hotel is converted from an abandoned factory, very new and quite unique. Spacious room with good service. Interestingly, for a two-night stay, the breakfast ($60), parking ($28), and bar beverages ($10) from the second day were not charged on the final bill.

reviews.author: Sm0421
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 FHR onsite credit (used for spa), $75 breakfast (used for donuts, Starbucks)
reviews.content_original: 服务好，加rollaway bed$40。酒店适合年轻人不适合家庭，View好，孩子喜欢。这个房型不错 当时纠结要不要订wrap around suite foundation view, 后来观察位置觉得其实这个更好。23楼正好 再高就看不清楚了，1:30 check in 2:30 room ready
reviews.content_en: Good service, added rollaway bed for $40. Hotel suits young people but not families. Great view, children enjoyed it. Good room type. Initially considered booking wrap around suite with fountain view, but after observing the location decided this one was actually better. 23rd floor is perfect—any higher and you can't see clearly. 1:30 check-in, 2:30 room ready.

reviews.author: Sm0421
reviews.booking_type: The Hotel Collection Prepaid (2 nights minimum)
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 FHR onsite credit (food only, but can cover resort fee)
reviews.content_original: 问了说有premium queen (大很多) 但要每晚$130. 一咬牙就没升级。最后孩子说这家酒店最差……（另两家是Cosmo & Marriott vacation club 2 bedroom). The Venetian ok, 下次来Vegas会试试Hilton Grand Vacation (in Planet Hollywood) 2bedroom, 一家老小出门 大最重要 有冰箱洗衣机就更好了 其他都不重要
reviews.content_en: Asked about premium queen (much larger) but required $130 per night surcharge, decided not to upgrade. Kids said this was the worst hotel of the three (Cosmopolitan and Marriott Vacation Club 2-bedroom were the others). The Venetian is okay. Next time in Vegas will try Hilton Grand Vacation (in Planet Hollywood) 2-bedroom for family travel. Size is most important, refrigerator and washing machine would be nice to have, everything else doesn't matter.

reviews.author: Scott
reviews.hotel_name_original: The US Grant, a Luxury Collection Hotel, San Diego
reviews.hotel_name_en: The US Grant, a Luxury Collection Hotel
reviews.content_original: 体验写在了 阳光灿烂的日子 — 加州一号公路游记及周边住宿体验

reviews.hotel_name_en: Palacio Del Inka, a Luxury Collection Hotel
reviews.content_original: 体验写在了 失落的文明 - 秘鲁马丘比丘、印加古道游记及住宿体验
