reviews.author: Scott
reviews.hotel_name_original: Sanctuary Lodge, a Belmond Hotel，Machu Picchu
reviews.actual_room_type: Deluxe Terrace Room with all-inclusive package
reviews.content_original: 体验写在了 失落的文明 - 秘鲁马丘比丘、印加古道游记及住宿体验
reviews.content_en: Experience detailed in blog post: Lost Civilization—Peru Machu Picchu and Inca Trail Travel and Hotel Experiences

reviews.author: ArrivingAgain
reviews.actual_room_type: Deluxe Room, 1 King Bed, Non-Smoking (upgraded to highest available floor - 22nd)
reviews.snp_stacking: SNP received after checkout, also counted towards Marriott seasonal promotion
reviews.content_original: 每房间$60早餐 credit，$100可用在任何地方，欢迎礼是马卡龙。入住的时候minibar有糖纸…打电话给前台给了5000万豪积分。部分设施有翻新，总体还是有点旧。不过毕竟是$280一晚的FHR，整体体验还行。一人30刀的早餐也够用。周日聊了一下可以把早餐换到brunch上。
reviews.content_en: $60 breakfast credit per room, $100 usable anywhere, welcome gift was macarons. Found candy wrappers in minibar on arrival—called front desk and received 5000 Marriott points. Some facilities renovated, overall a bit dated. For a $280/night FHR, overall experience was satisfactory. $30 per person breakfast was adequate. On Sunday discussed possibility of switching breakfast to brunch.

reviews.author: Rongye
reviews.content_original: 预定价格$733，说实话性价比不高。酒店本身是好酒店，硬件新、服务好、交通方便，但是700刀还是太贵了。木有自助早餐，给了两个人60刀的早餐credits，最后两个人连税带小费吃了90才勉强吃饱。本来计划用100刀F&B credit吃午餐，结果当天中午只有145刀一人的自助，就没用掉。不过最后倒是把早餐的税和小费都cover了，也还算可以（早知道多吃点了555。房间景色还是很不错的！还能看到窝火丰田中心！
reviews.content_en: Booked price $733, honestly not great value. The hotel itself is excellent with new facilities, good service, and convenient location, but $700 is still too expensive. No complimentary breakfast buffet; received $60 breakfast credits for two people. We ended up spending $90 including tax and tip to eat adequately. Had planned to use the $100 F&B credit for lunch, but the only option that day was $145 per person buffet, so didn't use it. However, it did cover the tax and tip from breakfast, so acceptable overall. The room view was quite nice! Could see the Toyota Center.

reviews.author: DELTA
reviews.content_original: 很厚道的直接升级到了studio suite，房间很大，理论上只能升一级，100刀额度+每天20刀的dining credit两人吃早餐差不多，酒店很厚道服务也很好，就是co的时候忘记抵扣credit了，重新去了趟前台才改过来
reviews.content_en: Very generous—directly upgraded to studio suite, room was very spacious. Theoretically only one category upgrade. $100 credit plus $20 daily dining credit per day was about right for two people's breakfast. Hotel was very generous and service was excellent, only issue was forgetting to deduct credit at checkout and had to go back to front desk to fix it.

reviews.author: jm1990
reviews.snp_stacking: Buffet breakfast and 118 CAD Food Credit received
reviews.content_original: 中规中矩的美式Buffet，Check In的时候需要刷白金卡，给了一封信和一个Fudge Bar做为欢迎礼
reviews.content_en: Standard American buffet breakfast. Required swiping Platinum card at check-in. Received a letter and a Fudge Bar as welcome gift.

reviews.author: jm1990
reviews.hotel_name_original: Manoir Hovey, North Hatley, QC, Canada
reviews.snp_stacking: Double breakfast + CAD 120 food credit; complimentary wine
reviews.content_original: 酒店在装修，有车把你送去屋前，有自己的Balcony，备品是欧舒丹，有拖鞋。晚餐有3种menu，全素的Tasting Menu($125?), 全荤的Tasting Menu($130?),85刀的Three -Course Meal， 选了便宜的，很好吃，没有踩雷。前菜点了halibut，主菜选了牛排，甜点选了巧克力。早餐的选择就少了。
reviews.content_en: Hotel under renovation with car service to room entrance. Private balcony, luxury amenities, slippers provided. Three dinner menus: vegetarian tasting menu (~$125), meat tasting menu (~$130), three-course meal ($85). Chose the affordable option—excellent food, no disappointments. Appetizer: halibut. Main: beef steak. Dessert: chocolate. Breakfast options were more limited.

reviews.author: anon62168739
reviews.hotel_name_original: Palace Hotel, a Luxury Collection Hotel, San Francisco
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 dining credit and $60 daily breakfast credit; chocolate amenity
reviews.content_original: 地理位置不错。。。机场到酒店基本坐bart直达。。。酒店说是100年历史。。。不过房间内部不旧。fhr benefit送了一盒海盐caramel巧克力, 给了$100 dining credit和$60早餐credit（每天）可以在pied piper，garden court和garden court里面一个to go的小摊子那里使用。。。不过这些餐馆感觉出品都挺一般的。。。pied piper点了个salad和炸鸡。。。炸鸡超级咸，非常不推荐。garden court我只去吃了早饭。。。buffet$39，吃的还可以吧。。。感觉主要是吃那个氛围。。。要是去的话记得提前跟concierge预定。。。总体来说还行吧。。。房费也就300，加上白金报销，加上餐饮报销基本没花什么钱。。。就是吃的实在不咋的
reviews.content_en: Excellent location—airport accessible via direct BART. Historic property (100 years), but rooms feel modern. FHR benefits: sea salt caramel chocolate, $100 dining credit, $60 daily breakfast credit. Dining options include Pied Piper, Garden Court, and a to-go counter. Food quality average overall. Pied Piper: salad and fried chicken—chicken was extremely salty, not recommended. Garden Court breakfast only: buffet ($39), decent atmosphere but book ahead with concierge. Afternoon tea supposedly famous but unavailable. Overall good value—room $300 plus Platinum reimbursement and dining credits made stay nearly free, but food quality disappointing.

reviews.author: joxu
reviews.hotel_name_original: Al Wathba, a Luxury Collection Desert Resort & Spa, Abu Dhabi
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes—upgraded to premium suite with private pool
reviews.content_original: 酒店在阿布扎比沙漠 超级豪华，晚餐beffet199/位，给了100刀吃饭，前台好像说我只花15即可，第二天结账两个人晚餐200多 好像直接免了，目前还没收到账单，前台接待超级客气，帮助升级到顶级带私人泳池豪华套间，早上免费早餐，很丰富
reviews.content_en: Ultra-luxury desert resort in Abu Dhabi. Dinner buffet $199 per person—received $100 credit, front desk suggested only $15 out-of-pocket. Second night dinner (~$200 for two) seemingly waived; bill pending. Exceptionally courteous front desk upgraded room to premium suite with private pool. Complimentary, abundant breakfast.

reviews.author: Yeson
reviews.content_original: 体验很棒，餐厅很好吃，服务特别热情。最近出差到了瑞士，刚好Bern有一家FHR，500CHF上下，感觉用掉FHR非常合适，就定了。这家据说是瑞士政府运营的，景色和地理位置都非常的好，也不在各家常旅客计划。一句话就是：我十分推荐！可惜时间比较紧没有用early check in和late check out，只是认真吃饭了。FHR的100 credit直接给coupon，吃完饭结账时候掏出来就好。Check in给升级了套房。
reviews.content_en: Great experience with excellent restaurant food and particularly enthusiastic service. Recently traveled to Switzerland on business and found this FHR in Bern at around 500 CHF, which felt like a perfect use of FHR points. The hotel is reportedly operated by the Swiss government with excellent views and location, and is not part of any hotel loyalty program. In short: highly recommended! Unfortunately time was tight so didn't use early check-in or late check-out, just enjoyed the meals. The FHR 100 credit was issued directly as a coupon and used when settling the bill. Upgraded to a suite at check-in.

reviews.author: speed
reviews.hotel_name_original: Four Seasons Resort Oahu at Ko Olina
reviews.hotel_name_en: Four Seasons Resort Oahu at Ko Olina
reviews.content_original:
酒店房间有点老，不过环境很好，适合带小孩去，很有鲤鱼，Doorman 提供鲤鱼食

早餐buffet不错，里面别的餐厅一般
reviews.content_en: The hotel rooms are a bit dated, but the environment is great and suitable for families with kids. There are lots of koi fish in the resort, and the doormen feed them. The breakfast buffet is nice, but the other restaurants are mediocre.

reviews.author: jefferyz
reviews.snp_stacking: 100 Spa Credit (cannot exchange for dining), late checkout, 60 daily breakfast credit, 25 mini bar credit on first day, 5 daily resort fee credit
reviews.content_original: 就是一些正常的FHR福利，LD玩得开心就行
reviews.content_en: Just normal FHR benefits, my partner had a good time

reviews.author: Ranilv
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Fairmont San Francisco
入住时段：2022/5 周中工作日 1晚
预订渠道：FHR Prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：queens / king with cityview
会员：无
福利：FHR基本标配，100刀餐饮credit，90刀早餐credit，入住时有小甜点放在房间里。申请了late checkout也愉快答应了，整体感觉很不错～
订得稍晚了些，用了20k积分+$270预订。积分以$200 statement credit返回来，两顿饭算上小费超了30刀左右，FHR $200报销几天就到账了。
reviews.content_en: Fairmont San Francisco, stayed midweek weekday in May 2022 for 1 night via FHR Prepay. Booked queen, upgraded to king with city view. No hotel loyalty status. Standard FHR benefits: $100 dining credit, $90 breakfast credit, complimentary dessert in room, and approved late checkout request. Overall felt very good. Booked late using 20k points + $270. Points returned as $200 statement credit. Two meals exceeded the credits by ~$30 with tip, but FHR's $200 reimbursement arrived within a few days.

reviews.author: evanzzq
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Auberge Saint-Antoine (Quebec City)

入住时段：2022/5/16-17

预订渠道：FHR Prepay

预定房型/实际入住房型：comfortable queen / luxury king （升级了但房间仍然很小）

福利：$120 CAD dining credit用在了晚餐，但由于本身比较贵（$110 CAD prefixe）所以还是额外付了不少。早餐质量很不错，见图。4 pm checkout。
reviews.content_en:
Hotel: Auberge Saint-Antoine (Quebec City)

Stay period: May 16-17, 2022

Booking channel: FHR Prepay

Booked/Actual room type: Comfortable Queen / Luxury King (upgraded but the room is still quite small)

Benefits: $120 CAD dining credit used for dinner, but since the meal itself was expensive ($110 CAD prefix) I still had to pay extra. Breakfast quality was excellent. 4pm checkout.

reviews.author: COVID-19
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称： Argos in Cappadocia

入住时段：2022年5月

预定渠道：AMEX FHR Prepaid

预定房型/实际入住房型：Deluxe/Suite (FHR可订三种房型：Stone $405, Deluxe $524, Suite $881, 为了拿套房订了Deluxe, 提前联系酒店确认只要suite没订光就可以升级）

酒店会员：非会员酒店

FHR福利：

升一级, 套房

免费自助早餐, 和卡帕普通的洞穴酒店没好多少.

$100餐饮credit, 只能用在一顿午餐或者晚餐, 限两人, 不包括酒精饮料和小费. $100=1600里拉可以买5份菲力, 所以餐厅经理让我们随便点超了也不用付钱. 最后不用签账单也不用小费, 服务太好了只好留了100里拉现金.

延迟退房4pm. 虽然checkout那天有婚礼, 所有房订满, 酒店还是给了, 4pm出房门, 8个白袍妇女已经拿着各种工具在院子待命 , 场面略微恐怖, 看来延迟退房酒店压力还挺大
reviews.content_en: Hotel Name: Argos in Cappadocia. Stay Period: May 2022. Booking Channel: AMEX FHR Prepaid. Booked Deluxe, received Suite upgrade (FHR offers three room types: Stone $405, Deluxe $524, Suite $881—I booked Deluxe to qualify for suite upgrade if available). Hotel Membership: Non-member. FHR Benefits: One-level upgrade to suite. Complimentary breakfast buffet, not notably different from typical Cappadocia cave hotels. $100 dining credit usable for one lunch or dinner for two people, excluding alcohol and tips. $100=1600 lira, covers five filet mignon dishes—restaurant manager waived overage charges. Outstanding service made us leave 100 lira cash tip. Late checkout at 4pm granted despite wedding event and fully booked hotel; at departure 8 women in white robes stood ready in courtyard with equipment—quite an impressive sight, showing the operational pressure of late checkout.

reviews.author: Qorus
reviews.snp_stacking: Member, no specific SNP/benefit stacking mentioned
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称： Westin Anaheim

入住时段：2022年5月

预定渠道：AMEX FHR Prepaid

预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐king/ Pool view king 就睡一个晚上懒得争了

酒店会员：会员

FHR福利：

升级pool view 

$100 餐饮，买了50$蛋糕 

早餐Buffet正正常

延迟退房4pm：要本人去退房，而且还说4Pm以后停车要收钱
reviews.content_en: Hotel Name: Westin Anaheim. Stay Period: May 2022. Booking Channel: AMEX FHR Prepaid. Booked economy king, received pool view king upgrade—only staying one night, didn't bother negotiating further. Hotel Membership: Member. FHR Benefits: Upgrade to pool view. $100 dining credit, used $50 towards dessert. Breakfast buffet, standard offering. Late checkout at 4pm: Required personal checkout, charged for parking after 4pm.

reviews.author: Lax
reviews.hotel_name_original: Hotel Fairmont The Queen Elizabeth, Montreal, QC, Canada
reviews.actual_room_type: Standard double bed room with cathedral view
reviews.content_original: 房间不大，住两晚送一晚。算上乱七八糟的fee，三晚实扣$737.54 USD，所以其实并没有很合算。酒店车位也满了需要在外面自己找，$30 CAD一天的样子。Food credit用在了酒店唯一的餐厅上(Rosélys)，服务不是特别好，味道也一般，环境倒是不错。酒店没有免费WIFI !!!
reviews.content_en: Room is not very spacious. Book two nights, get one free. After miscellaneous fees, actual charge for three nights was $737.54 USD, so not particularly good value. Hotel parking was full; had to park outside at around $30 CAD per day. Used the food credit at the hotel's only restaurant (Rosélys). Service was mediocre, food taste was average, but the ambiance was nice. No free WiFi at the hotel!

reviews.author: Nana0206
reviews.actual_room_type: Budget room with balcony, ocean and Diamond Head view
reviews.snp_stacking: Room upgrade (one level), complimentary breakfast ($50/person), $100 credit usable for all hotel spending/activities/dining/shopping, guaranteed 4pm late checkout, turn-down service
reviews.content_original: 乞丐房不带阳台/乞丐房带阳台，看得到钻石山和一点点海。FHR福利：1. 升一级（只升一级）2. 免费自助早餐价值50刀/人。本土狗觉得还不错，有现做的omlet, 生鱼片，各种小糕点，纳豆，荞麦面，牛肉，可丽饼，水果3.$100 credit 可以用在所有酒店消费，activities, dining, shopping. 用在了周六晚上的seafood buffet，88$一个人，饮料单点，两人一共花了230，最后charge130. 味道还行，prime rib和butter fish 很好吃4. 保证延迟退房4pm。有turn down service，总体感觉不错，但不算credit700一晚不含早本土狗觉得不太值，500一晚含早和100的credit可以去住，毕竟欧胡岛上均价300+。Check-in, check out时前台一直强调我们只住一晚让本土狗感觉羊毛党地位低下。
reviews.content_en: Budget room without balcony upgraded to budget room with balcony, with views of Diamond Head and a bit of ocean. FHR benefits: 1) One-level room upgrade 2) Complimentary buffet breakfast worth $50/person. Quite good - fresh made omelets, sashimi, various pastries, natto, soba noodles, beef, crepes, fruit 3) $100 credit usable for all hotel spending, activities, dining, shopping. Used for Saturday evening seafood buffet at $88/person. Ordered drinks separately; two people spent $230 total, final charge $130. Food was decent, prime rib and butter fish were excellent 4) Guaranteed 4pm late checkout, with turn-down service. Overall nice experience, but at $700/night without breakfast doesn't seem worth it; at $500/night with breakfast and $100 credit would be good, since average Oahu rate is $300+. At check-in and check-out, the front desk kept emphasizing we were only staying one night, making me feel like a second-class guest.

reviews.author: lolll
reviews.snp_stacking: Room upgrade, excellent breakfast (available regardless of booking method)
reviews.content_original: 早饭非常赞，不通过fhr定也会有。酒店的无边泳池也是绝美
reviews.content_en: Breakfast was excellent, available whether booked through FHR or not. The hotel's infinity pool is absolutely stunning.

reviews.author: lfan1992
reviews.snp_stacking: $100 FHR credit, $80 breakfast credit ($40/person x 2), 4pm checkout
reviews.content_original: 吃了中餐，带烤鸭。水平比想象中的要好，不值原价但扣掉credit三四十刀的话还是蛮划算的。我们点了叉烧，烤鸭，干瘪四季豆，牛肉煎饺。烤鸭的话饼子太粘，叉烧当中不太入味，牛肉煎饺汁水不够。讲个趣事：我犯蠢本来准备订烤鸭套餐-鸭粥牙色拉什么的，碰到华人大堂经理暗示两边别点这个，这是坑白人的。还好领导敏锐接了灵子。
reviews.content_en: Had Chinese food with Peking duck. The quality was better than expected. Not worth the full price, but with $30-40 off after credits, it was quite reasonable. We ordered char siu, roasted duck, stringy green beans, and beef fried dumplings. The duck pancakes were too sticky, the char siu lacked flavor, and the dumplings lacked sauce. Funny story: I was about to order the Peking duck combo with duck congee and duck salad, when I ran into the Chinese concierge manager who subtly hinted we should avoid this—it's a tourist trap. Fortunately my partner caught on. The manager recommended ordering items separately from another page instead, and later walked by our table to give us a thumbs up when he saw us enjoying our meal.

reviews.author: naive_hk_journalist
reviews.hotel_name_original: Palace Hotel, a Luxury Collection Hotel, San Francisco
reviews.hotel_name_en: Palace Hotel, a Luxury Collection Hotel
reviews.content_original: 那天早上临时订的, 给了$100 dining credit和$60早餐credit。晚上10点才去check in的只能全部用在早餐，最后garden court 2个人吃了120，小费也用credit cover了
reviews.content_en: Booked last minute that morning. Received $100 dining credit and $60 breakfast credit. Checked in at 10pm, could only use all credits for breakfast. Ate at Garden Court with 2 people for $120, tip also covered by credit.

reviews.author: DSZ
reviews.actual_room_type: Deluxe One King Bed, City View and One Bedroom Suite, Oceanfront
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes - SNP initially did not post. Contacted Marriott with FHR screenshot. Posted after 2 weeks.
reviews.content_original: 两个 reservations，头两晚两个房间都给到了deluxe one king bed city view，谈心之后第二个房间最后一晚给到了One bedroom suite, oceanfront。SNP一开始没有到账，找Marriott开了个case，附上FHR截图；两周后SNP到账
reviews.content_en: Two reservations. First two nights both rooms received Deluxe One King Bed, City View. After discussion, second room's final night upgraded to One Bedroom Suite, Oceanfront. SNP initially did not post. Opened case with Marriott, attached FHR screenshot. SNP posted after 2 weeks.

reviews.author: DSZ
reviews.booking_type: FHR Prepay and FHR Pay Later
reviews.booked_room_type: City View Room or Studio Terrace
reviews.content_original: 只要去vegas一般就会住Cosmo，试过FHR prepaid and pay later，从来就没有过snp，每次前台说能recognize Marriott 的会员号，不过从来没在app上看到过订单…而且找Marriott开不了case因为压根没有Marriott reservation number，不知道是不是从cosmo官网identity赌场那边定的
reviews.content_en: Always stays at Cosmo when in Vegas. Tried both FHR prepay and pay later. Never received SNP. Front desk says it recognizes Marriott member number, but never showed in app. Cannot open case with Marriott as there's no Marriott reservation number. Uncertain if booked through Cosmo's website for casino account.

reviews.author: DSZ
reviews.booking_type: FHR Prepay and FHR Pay Later
reviews.booked_room_type: City View Room or Studio Terrace
reviews.content_original: 从来就没有过snp，每次前台说能recognize Marriott 的会员号，不过从来没在app上看到过订单
reviews.content_en: Never received SNP. Front desk recognizes Marriott member number but never showed in app.

reviews.author: DSZ
reviews.booking_type: FHR Prepay and FHR Pay Later
reviews.booked_room_type: City View Room or Studio Terrace
reviews.content_original: 从来就没有过snp，每次升级不用过度谈心就没跟cosmo和万豪纠缠了
reviews.content_en: Never received SNP. Upgrades work fine without excessive negotiation, so no issues with Cosmo or Marriott.

reviews.author: Martini
reviews.hotel_name_original: The US Grant, a luxury collection hotel, San Diego
reviews.content_original: 一共住了三晚，第一晚积分预定，后两晚两个独立的FHR订单，积分预定因为钛金升级了一级，但FHR订单保持了原样没有更多的升级。第一晚本来用了套房券，没给升。房间挺小的，酒店装修是欧美式，钛金有$20多早餐or积分自选，FHR送$100 credit+$75早餐/in room dining额度。总体来说还是很划算，400多总价，200报销，100 credit吃晚饭，$75用于早中午in room dining。缺点是有可能有一晚我没给housekeeping小费，第二天她早上九点多按门铃叫醒我，我感觉她是故意的。
reviews.content_en: Total 3 nights: first night points redemption, next two nights separate FHR bookings. Points redemption upgraded 1 level due to Titanium, but FHR bookings unchanged. First night used suite certificate but no upgrade. Small rooms with European/American decor. Titanium provides $20+ breakfast or points choice. FHR provides $100 credit + $75 breakfast/in-room dining. Excellent value: $400+ total, $200 reimbursable, $100 credit for dinner, $75 for breakfast/lunch in-room. Downside: possibly missed tipping housekeeping one night - she knocked at 9am next morning, possibly intentionally.

reviews.author: MKLDH
reviews.content_original: 这家酒店用FHR订非常合适，官网的non-refundable rate和FHR的可取消价差不多。罗莱夏朵本身也没有公开的会员项目，可以安心拿FHR prepay的5x MR。因为是all-inclusive所以100刀credit只能用于spa，但和美国那些送spa credit但所有项目都要倒贴的酒店不同，这里的100刀是可以换一小时按摩的，相对比较良心。check-in后尽快预约，因为按摩师并不是常驻酒店而是从邻市赶来的。建议订第二级别的房型Dawn/Dusk有机会像我一样被升级到Corner，既可看到日出又可看到日落，是酒店最好的房型，比第二级别的房贵400刀一晚
reviews.content_en: Excellent FHR value. Official website non-refundable rate comparable to FHR cancellable rate. Relais & Châteaux has no public member program, so earn 5x MR confidently. All-inclusive property so $100 credit only for spa. Unlike US hotels with spa credits requiring additional payment, $100 here gets 1 hour massage - relatively fair. Book massage immediately after check-in as therapist is not resident but travels from nearby city. Recommend 2nd tier Dawn/Dusk rooms (named for sunset/sunrise views) for chance to upgrade to Corner room like author did - Corner has both sunrise and sunset views, best room in hotel, $400/night more than 2nd tier.

reviews.author: garfieldwei
reviews.actual_room_type: King suite (downgraded to double bed room per guest request)
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes, but first night did not receive SNP. First night: $60 breakfast credit + $100 credit (moved to second night upon request).
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：ritz carlton tyson corner
入住时段： 6/11/2022 - 6/13/2022
预定渠道：第一晚FHR prepay，第二晚官网free night
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐双床房 / 升级成了大床房套房，但实际我们需要双床房所以又换成了乞丐双床房
会员等级：钛金
SNP/会员福利：两晚在官网都有显示但是第一晚没给SNP
备注：第一晚给了早餐60 credit + 100 credit。因为第一天到的很晚而且第二天白天行程也很满，所以和客服谈心后让他们把100 credit挪到了第二天。
reviews.content_en: Hotel: The Ritz-Carlton Tysons. Stay: 6/11/2022 - 6/13/2022. Booking: First night FHR prepay, second night free night from official website. Booked room: Double bed (economy). Actual room: Upgraded to king suite, but guest requested change back to double bed room. Membership: Platinum Amex (Titanium status). SNP/benefits: Both nights showed benefits on official website but first night did not receive SNP. First night included $60 breakfast credit + $100 credit; since check-in was late and next day schedule was full, guest negotiated with staff to move the $100 credit to the second night.

reviews.author: qgao8
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes. $125 FHR credit (usable most places, used for food at multiple restaurants). $50 Hilton membership credit (only for DWAG bar, used for appetizers and drinks). $33×2 breakfast credit. Welcome amenity: 2 free drinks at bar after 4pm.
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Crockfords Las Vegas
入住时段：2022.6 某个周三
预定渠道：FHR prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：1 king city view/ 1 king strip view
酒店会员：白金送的希尔顿金，自动给了房晚
SNP/会员福利：$125 fhr credit几乎可以用所有地方，在street food吃了两顿，老虎堂是不报销的，炒粿条和海南鸡饭好吃，饺子不要点，巨雷。$50 希尔顿会籍credit只能用在dwag bar，点了薯条和两杯酒，无功无过。$33*2早饭应该大部分都行，吃了the kitchen自助，大冤种做法，建议单点。fhr欢迎礼可以在大堂等bar 4pm之后免费两杯酒。一个平平无奇的周三居然满房，一起check in的三个fhr都没有升房而且在大堂坐了1h+才拿到房卡。
备注：赌场不算太大，但是很新没烟味。荷官不错。入住刷的aspire，没有问题，resort fee和老虎堂之类的吃吃喝喝就全报掉了。建议淡季来比较容易升房，不过vegas的淡季很难讲。
reviews.content_en: Hotel: Crockfords Las Vegas. Stay: A Wednesday in June 2022. Booking: FHR prepay. Booked room: 1 King city view. Actual room: 1 King strip view. Membership: Hilton Gold (from Platinum card, automatically received room nights). SNP/benefits: $125 FHR credit usable almost everywhere—tried the street food restaurant twice, though Tiger Hall is not covered. Stir-fried rice cake and Hainanese chicken were good; skip the dumplings. $50 Hilton membership credit only works at DWAG bar—ordered fries and two drinks, decent. $33×2 breakfast credit—most buffets covered, though The Kitchen buffet was poor value; recommend ordering à la carte. Welcome amenity: 2 free drinks at bar/lounge after 4pm. Despite being an ordinary Wednesday, hotel was fully booked; three other FHR guests checking in at the same time received no upgrades and waited 1+ hour at the lobby to get room keys. Casino is not very large but brand new with no smoke smell. Dealers are good. Paid with Aspire card without issues; resort fees and miscellaneous charges were fully covered. Recommend visiting off-season for better room upgrade chances, though Vegas off-season is hard to predict.

reviews.author: qgao8
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes. $100 spa credit (purchased two day passes, Mon-Thu $60/person, great amenities near pool). $75 breakfast credit (ate at Wicked Spoon downstairs, Marriott Gold and above can use invited guest status; recommend going around 10:30am for early bird pricing on lunch menu including snow crab legs).
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas
入住时段：2022.6 某个周四
预定渠道：FHR Prepay
预定房型/实际入住房型：two queen city view/one king fountain view studio
酒店会员：白金送的万豪金
SNP/会员福利：$100 spa credit 买了两张day pass，周一到周四是60/person，很舒服条件很好，对面就是泳池，可以两边换着泡。$75 早餐credit吃楼下wicked spoon，万豪金以上都可以走invited guest，建议10:30左右去，可以用早市价格吃午市的菜单，包括雪蟹腿（排队很长但量管饱）。不追求房型的话early check in基本能保证。check in可以去lounge，也可以去拿水和咖啡，房间里是没水的。
备注：赌场不大，电梯很多，夜店很好能看到好多美女小姐姐。去百乐宫or crystal mall买买买很方便。酒店装修风格也很夜店。fountain view看喷泉听不到音乐，阳台上的沙发感觉被烟味or大麻腌入味了。卫生一般，服务很好。
reviews.content_en: Hotel: The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas. Stay: A Thursday in June 2022. Booking: FHR Prepay. Booked room: Two queen city view. Actual room: One king fountain view studio. Membership: Marriott Gold (from Platinum card). SNP/benefits: $100 spa credit—purchased two day passes at $60/person (Mon-Thu), excellent amenities with nice views of the pool across the way; can relax at both locations. $75 breakfast credit used at Wicked Spoon downstairs; Marriott Gold and above can use invited guest status for better pricing. Recommend arriving around 10:30am to use early-bird prices on the lunch menu, including snow crab legs (long line but generous portions). Early check-in basically guaranteed if not picky about room type. Check-in can include lounge access or water and coffee; rooms don't have water provided. Casino is not large but many elevators; nightclub scene is good with lots of attractive people. Bellagio or Crystal Mall very convenient for shopping. Hotel's interior design has a nightclub aesthetic. Fountain view allows seeing the fountains but not hearing the music; balcony furniture smells heavily of cigarette and marijuana smoke. Hygiene is average, service is excellent.

reviews.author: huaweiping
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes. Benefits didn't show in app initially but appeared after check-out. Staff confirmed membership benefits upon check-in.
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Hotel Figueroa
入住时段： 5/28/2022 - 5/30/2022
预定渠道：Amex Travel THC
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐双床房 / 乞丐双床房，前台表示满客
会员等级：Hyatt Gold
SNP/会员福利：有，在App都没有显示但是check in的时候和前台说了拍了我的会员卡，check out之后都看到了。
房间不大但是算上amex的200刀在dtla感觉还行。定了两间房都给了100刀credit但是似乎没法儿合起来用。
reviews.content_en: Hotel: Hotel Figueroa. Stay: 5/28/2022 - 5/30/2022. Booking: Amex Travel THC. Booked room: Double bed (economy). Actual room: Double bed (economy); front desk indicated fully booked. Membership: Hyatt Gold. SNP/benefits: Yes, but didn't initially show in app. At check-in, informed front desk and showed membership card; benefits appeared after check-out. Rooms are not large, but with Amex's $200 credit, feels reasonable for DTLA. Booked two rooms, each received $100 credit, but unfortunately couldn't combine them.

reviews.author: huaweiping
reviews.snp_stacking: Yes, showed directly in app. $100 credit used for dining; gratuity also covered by credit.
reviews.content_original:
酒店名称：Andaz Savannah
入住时段： 6/10/2022 - 6/12/2022
预定渠道：Amex Travel THC
预定房型/实际入住房型：乞丐大床房 / 乞丐大床房，前台表示满客
会员等级：Hyatt Gold
SNP/会员福利：有，app里直接显示。
Savannah还是好地方适合度假，100刀credit在酒店里吃了感觉还凑合，不过小费也能在credit里抵掉很贴心。
建议大家还是六七月份不要去了，又热又潮。本地人推荐十月份或者三月份到四月初。
reviews.content_en: Hotel: Andaz Savannah. Stay: 6/10/2022 - 6/12/2022. Booking: Amex Travel THC. Booked room: King bed (economy). Actual room: King bed (economy); front desk indicated fully booked. Membership: Hyatt Gold. SNP/benefits: Yes, showed directly in app. Savannah is a great vacation destination. The $100 credit used for in-hotel dining was decent, and it's thoughtful that gratuity is also covered by the credit. Recommend avoiding June-July—it's hot and humid. Locals recommend October or March through early April as best seasons.
